The channel primarily focuses on entertaining its viewers with new Nepali movies, encompassing various genres such as action, comedy, romance, horror, drama, etc.

All the videos on this channel are uploaded with full digital copyrights either owned by OSR Digital or officially provided by different content owners. If there are any copyright issues with the uploaded videos, please feel free to contact us to resolve the matter and avoid conflicts.

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla -Official Trailer| Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 16 Apr
snippet.description:
Welcome to Bhooth Bangla. Yahan na toh log normal hain... Aur upar se Bangla bhi paranormal hai. 
Enter at your own risk 🧟‍♀️

#BhoothBanglaTrailer out now

#BhoothBangla, paid previews begin in theatres 16th April 2026, 9 PM onwards 👻

When London-returned Arjun Acharya arrives in the sleepy town of Mangalpur to host his sister’s wedding at his newly inherited ancestral palace, he finds himself caught in a whirlwind of terrified locals, bizarre ghostly happenings, and hilarious chaos—until he begins uncovering the shocking truth behind the palace’s centuries-old legend.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present
Bhooth Bangla

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Jisshu Sengupta, Manoj Joshi, Mithila Palkar, Asrani Ji, Rajesh Sharma 
Directed by: Priyadarshan
Produced by: Akshay Kumar, Shobha Kapoor, Ektaa R. Kapoor
Co-producer: Vimal Doshi, Faara Sheikh, Vedant Vikaas Baali
Group CEO & CFO (BTL): Sanjay Dwivedi
Director of Photography: Divakar Mani
Story by: Aakash Kaushik
Screenplay by: Priyadarshan, Rohan Shankar, Abilash Nair
Dialogues by: Rohan Shankar
Music: Pritam
Lyrics: Yitendra Mishra & Kumaar
Co-Director: Abilash Nair
Editor: Aiyappan Nair M.S
Line Producers: Suresh Balaji & George Pius
Costume Designers: V Sai Babu, Dhanya Balakrishnan, Veera Kapur, Rimple & Harpreet
Sound Designers: Rajakrishnan & Shahaab Alam
Background Score: Ronnie Raphael
DI: Sri Sarathi Studios
DI Colorist: Vishnuvardhan
VFX: WRC Studio LLP
VFX Supervisor: Sidharth Priyadarshan
Production Designer: Sabu Cyril
Director of Choreography: Pony Verma, Ganesh Acharya
Group Commercial Head (BTL): Hamavvand Chwda
Head of Marketing (BTL): Raveena S Deshpaande
Post Production Head (BTL): Manohar Pandya
VP Licensing and Syndication (BTL): Ankit Chauhan
Commercial Head (BTL): Mitesh Bilakhia
Executive Producer: Pooja Tiwari Angarish
Publicity Designer: House of Awe
Media Consultant: Spice
Digital Agency: Everymedia
Visual Promotions: Just Right Studioz NX

#ZeeMusicCompany #PenMovies

Kali Kali is a fusion of a Hindi chorus, Nepali folk melodies, and new school rap.

Banai khayo dadelo le

snippet.title: Rama | Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana | Nitesh Tiwari | Ranbir, Yash, Hans Zimmer & A.R. Rahman
snippet.description:
Rama is the greatest of all time because he lived a life where the choices he made were always in the benefit of the greater good, duty over desire, and sacrifice over self. 

His legacy continues to enhance and empower humanity over time and bring the belief in the goodness of the human spirit to resolve all conflict and bring peace to the world. 

Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana 
Directed by Nitesh Tiwari 

In cinemas worldwide
Ramayana Part 1 🏹
Diwali 2026

---------------------------------------------------

Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana
Our Truth. Our History.

Starring: 
Ranbir Kapoor as Rama 
Yash as Ravana 
Sai Pallavi as Sita 
Ravie Dubey as Lakshman 
Sunny Deol as Hanuman

Co-Produced by Yash
Adapted for Screenplay by Shridhar Raghavan & Nitesh Tiwari.
Directed by Nitesh Tiwari

Music by Hans Zimmer & A.R. Rahman
Lyrics by Kumar Vishwas

VFX by DNEG (8-time Academy Award winner)

Filmed for IMAX

Presented by Prime Focus Studios in association with Monster Mind Creations

Audio on Sony Music Entertainment India Pvt. Ltd (C) 2026

Subscribe & Follow Sony Music India:
https://www.youtube.com/@UC56gTxNs4f9xZ7Pa2i5xNzg 
https://www.facebook.com/SonyMusicIndia 
https://www.instagram.com/sonymusicindia
https://www.snapchat.com/add/sonymusic_india
https://twitter.com/sonymusicindia

#Rama #Ramayana #HansZimmer #ARRahman #RanbirKapoor #Yash #Diwali2026 #SonyMusicIndia #NiteshTiwari #NamitMalhotra

snippet.title: Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana Rama Trailer • Reaction
snippet.description:
#Ramayana #thePJ #PJExplained

My Social Media Handles: 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/pjexplained/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/pjexplained/
SnapChat: https://www.snapchat.com/add/pjexplained

Threads: https://www.threads.net/@pjexplained 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/pjexplained/
WhatsApp: https://shorturl.at/vQxpU

The thePJ is a web channel intended to promote cinema through films review, interviews, discussions, video essays and analytical compilations. It is intended primarily for the purpose of encouraging informed discussions, criticism and review of cinema and towards such purpose the programs use short extracts of cinematograph films, sounds recording and photographic works. These clips and extracts are of a minimal nature and the use is not intended to interfere in any manner with their commercial exploitation of the compete work by the owners of the copyright. The use of works are in compliance with the fair dealing exception provided under Sec. 52 of the Copyright Act, and we asset our use of the works under the exception provided for criticism and review.

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla Trailer REVIEW | Deeksha Sharma

Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa Directed by Priyadarshan in Bhooth Bangla Movie In Cinemas 16 Apr is set for Comedy with Horror Twist competing with Bhool Bhulaiyaa Kartik Aaryan Franchise & Manjulika Nostalgia competition. snippet.title: Gehra Hua - Lyrical (Full Version) | Dhurandhar, Ranveer Singh, Sara A,Shashwat Sachdev,Arijit Singh
snippet.description:
Dive into the full depth of emotions with lyrics that bring every feeling to life.

👉 Subscribe to Saregama Music: https://bit.ly/3FkAS0W

Jio Studios Presents
A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR

Written, Directed and Produced by: Aditya Dhar
Produced by: Jyoti Deshpande
Produced by: Lokesh Dhar

Cast: Ranveer Singh, Sanjay Dutt, Akshaye Khanna, R. Madhavan, Arjun Rampal, Sara Arjun

A Shashwat Sachdev Musical

Composed, Produced and arranged by Shashwat Sachdev 
Singer: Arijit Singh, Armaan Khan 
Lyrics: Irshad Kamil
Music Supervisor: Adarsh Vishwakarma
Music producers: Sayantan Guha, Yash Singh
Bassist: Mohini Dey 
Tabla: Fateh Mohammed Sulemani
Sarangi: Momin Khan 
Backing vocals: Nikitha Venkatesh, Divya S Iyer, Shudi Ramani, Srishhti Bhitrikothiy

Mixed and mastered by: Akash Shravan

Lyrics:
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Tu agar meri ye ujaale tere 
Tu agar meri dil hawaale tere 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Betaab sa mohabbbat ka tu inqalab hai 
Mera jahan teri baahon mein khaab khaab hai 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Rang aashiqui 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Dariya dua 
Gehra hua 
Tera hua 
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Palke jhapakta hai aasma 
Laakhon farishton ki hai tu jaan 
Wo poochte hain rehti kahan 
Meri baahon mein rehti unko bataa 
Palke jhapakta hai aasma 
Usne bhi tujhsa dekha kahan 
Hai raunakein wahan tu hai jahan 
Meri baahon mein rehna yehi hai dua 
Tu agar meri hai fasaana tera 
Tu agar meri toh zamaana tera 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Betaab sa mohabbbat ka tu inqalab hai 
Mera jahaan teri baahon mein khaab khaab hai 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Rang aashiqui 
Gehra hua 
Tera hua 
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Ma Re 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Re Sa 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Ma Re 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Re Sa 
Teri mohabbat mein jalna bhi hai 
Aur tujhse bachke hi chalna bhi hai 
Kuch rang apna badalna bhi hai 
Maine dhalna tere rang mein hai sadaa 
Tu chaand hai ik dhadakta hua 
Chori se mujhko hi takta hua 
Seene se lagke chamakta hua 
Meri jannat ka rasta 
Tu hi toh hua 
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Betaab sa mohabbbat ka tu inqalab hai 
Mera jahaan teri baahon mein khaab khaab hai 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Rang aashiqui 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Dariya dua 
Gehra hua

#saraarjun

snippet.title: Raja Shivaji First Look  Hindi Teaser | Riteish D | Genelia D | Sanjay D | In Cinemas 1 May 2026
snippet.description:
For the land that forged warriors. 
For the faith that never wavered. 
For the dream of Swarajya that lived in every heart… 
With deep reverence to Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj,  we proudly unveil the first look teaser of Raja Shivaji — India’s Greatest Warrior King. 👑 
 Our King. Our Pride. Our Legacy. 🚩 
 Directed by Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh. 
#RajaShivaji In cinemas on 1st May 2026 in Marathi, Hindi & Telugu.

Jio Studios Presents
A Mumbai Film Company Production
Raja Shivaji
Directed by: Riteish Deshmukh
Produced by: Jyoti Deshpande & Genelia Deshmukh
Music: Ajay-Atul 
Cinematographer: Santosh Sivan (Asc, Isc)
Story screenplay: Ajit wadekar, Sandeep Patil, Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh
Dialogue writer: Prajakt Deshmukh
Additional Hindi dialogues: Jaideep Yadav
Editor: Urvashi Saxena
Background Score: John Stewart Eduri
Production designer: Nikhil Kovale, Apurva Bhagat, Shashank Tere
Associate Producer: Nandita Sachdev
Executive Producer: Sandeep Patil
Casting Director: Rohan Mapuskar
Sound Designer: Kunal & Parikshit
Primary Costume Designer: Rushi Sharma & Manoshi Nath
Secondary Costume Designer: Pournima Aak
Additional Wardrobe / Styling: Nafs [Rizwan Shaikh & Deeksha Sharma Khan]
Action Director: Dawid Szatarski & Manohar Verma
Choreographer: Remo D’souza
Hair-Makeup Designer: Audrey Sangma, Nitin Indulkar, Hakim Aalim & Kanta Motwani
Chief Assistant Director: Charul Patil
Director’s Assistant: Chandni Kargathra
Research Consultant: Ketan Puri
VFX Supervisor: Pushpendra Dubey & Swapnil Ambre
CG & VFX: Assemblage Entertainment
Di Studio: Prime Focus Limited
Di Colorist: Ashirwad Hadkar
Sound Mixing
Post Producer: Takshit Pradhan
Re-recording mixer:
   
Raja Shivaji, based on the life of one of India’s Greatest Warrior King – Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj, who rose against formidable powers to lay the foundation of Swarajya. Experience this grand historical spectacle on the big screen, unfolding in Marathi, Hindi, and Telugu.
 
1st May 2026
In Cinemas
A Jio Studios Release

snippet.title: Patriot Hindi Trailer | Mammootty | Mohanlal | Mahesh Narayanan | Anto Joseph | 1st May
snippet.description:
From Anto Joseph Productions, the banner behind some of the most acclaimed and celebrated films in recent times, and visionary filmmaker Mahesh Narayanan, comes the official trailer of Patriot.
Featuring an ensemble of legends: Mammootty, Mohanlal, Fahadh Faasil, Kunchacko Boban, Nayanthara, and Revathy.

North India Release by PEN MARUDHAR CINE ENTERTAINMENT

Written & Directed by: Mahesh Narayanan
Produced by: Anto Joseph, K. G. Anil Kumar
Co-Produced by: C. R. Saleem, Subhash George Manuel
Music & Original Score: Sushin Shyam
Director of Photography: Manush Nandan ISC
Executive Producers: C. V. Sarathi, Rajesh Krishna
Edited by: Mahesh Narayanan, Rahul Radhakrishnan
Production Design: Shajie Naduvil, Jibin Jacob
Audiography: Vishnu Govind
Sync Sound: Vaisakh P. V.
Production Controller: Dixon Poduthas
Line Producers:
Sunil Singh, Niroop Pinto, Justin Boban, Jeswin Boban
Makeup: Ranjith Ambady
Lyrics: Anwar Ali, Vinayak Sasikumar
Action Directors:
Dhilip Subbarayan, Stunt Silva, Mafia Sasi, Riyaz - Habib, Mahesh Mathew
Costume Design: Dhanya Balakrishnan
Choreography: Shobi Paulraj
VFX:
Firefly, Eggwhite, Ident VFX Lab, Phantom FX, Binary Circus, Pictorial FX
Chief Associate Director: Linu Antony
Associate Director: Phantom Praveen
DI Colorist: Ashirwad Hadkar ISC
Stills: Navin Murali
Publicity Design: Aesthetic Kunjamma
PRO: Vaisakh C. Vadakkeveedu, Jinu Anilkumar
Digital PR : Vishnu Sugathan
Trailer Cuts: Arju Benn

snippet.title: "Malai Hera" Sabin Rai & The Pharaoh
snippet.description:
“Malai Hera” is a gentle love song where a single glance holds a thousand unspoken feelings and hearts speak in silence.

Sabin Rai & The Pharaoh are:

Sabin Rai 
Binod Lama Tamang
Jeevan Lama
John Shrestha

Audio engineers
Stephen Tamang
Subash Gurung

Crew 
Jitesh Shakya
Nara Bahadur Khatri
Samir Shrestha

Mix and Master by Stephen tamang
Recording Studio : Fuzz_studio_nepal.
Keyboard sessions: Anup sunar ( Rahar music Creations )
Back vocals : Anup sunara, Aashis Rokka.

Video credit :
A FILM BY CHINOE TALES PRODUCTION
VIDEO DIRECTOR : ABHI SAMPANG RAI
CAST: NEELAM RAI. AKASH SUHANG LIMBU. AAYUS RAI
DOP: BIKESH MAGAR. ASSIST DIR: ARSHU SHRESTHA. CINEMATOGRAPHY: KIWA KHIMDUNG RAI.

EDIT: BIKESH MAGAR. SANTOSH SHAH THAKURI. coLor: BIKESH MAGAR.

snippet.title: Supergirl | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
This Summer, find your place in the universe. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in theaters and IMAX ® across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

snippet.title: Elbaph Arc Official Trailer | April 5, 2026 | ONE PIECE
snippet.description:
Anime ONE PIECE broadcast will resume in Japan with the crew setting sail to Elbaph!
April 5, 2026 11:15 PM(JST)

♪OPENING THEME "Luminous"by AiNA THE END

◆ Synopsis
After a daring escape from the Future Island Egghead, the Straw Hat Crew set their course for a legendary destination. Joined by the mighty Giant Warrior Pirates, they finally reach Elbaph, the long-awaited Land of Giants. 

New encounters with Giants, and long hoped for reunions unfold. A colossal new chapter begins as the crew heads into an adventure unlike anything before, all in the pursuit of the ultimate treasure, the “ONE PIECE!”

👉SUBSCRIBE to our channel for MORE: @OnePieceOfficialENG 

#ONEPIECE #Elbaph #Trailer #Anime #Luffy #Loki #strawhatcrew #onepieceanime

de-DE.title: Offizieller Trailer zum Elbaph-Arc | 5. April 2026 | ONE PIECE
de-DE.description:
Die Ausstrahlung von ONE PIECE wird in Japan fortgesetzt! Die Strohhutbande sticht in See nach Elbaph!

5. April 2026, 23:15 Uhr (JST)

♪ OPENING THEME "Luminous" von AiNA THE END

◆ Zusammenfassung
Nach einer waghalsigen Flucht von Egghead von der Zukunftsinsel nimmt die Strohhutbande Kurs auf ein legendäres Ziel. Gemeinsam mit den mächtigen Riesen-Kriegerpiraten erreichen sie endlich Elbaph, das lang ersehnte Land der Riesen.

Neue Begegnungen mit Riesen und lang ersehnte Wiedersehen erwarten sie. Ein neues, gewaltiges Kapitel beginnt, als die Crew sich auf ein Abenteuer wie nie zuvor begibt – alles auf der Suche nach dem ultimativen Schatz: dem „ONE PIECE!“

👉 Abonniert unseren Kanal für mehr: @OnePieceOfficialENG

#ONEPIECE #Elbaph #Trailer #Anime #Luffy #Loki #strawhatcrew #onepieceanime

fr-FR.title: Bande-annonce officielle de l'arc Elbaph | 5 avril 2026 | ONE PIECE
fr-FR.description:
La diffusion de l'anime ONE PIECE reprend au Japon ! L'équipage met le cap sur Elbaph !

5 avril 2026 à 23h15 (JST)

♪GÉNÉRIQUE « Luminous » par AiNA THE END

◆ Synopsis
Après une évasion audacieuse de l'Île du Futur d'Egghead, l'équipage du Chapeau de Paille met le cap sur une destination légendaire. Rejoints par les puissants Pirates Guerriers Géants, ils atteignent enfin Elbaph, le Pays des Géants tant attendu.

De nouvelles rencontres avec des Géants et des retrouvailles tant espérées les attendent. Un nouveau chapitre colossal commence alors que l'équipage se lance dans une aventure sans précédent, à la recherche du trésor ultime : le « ONE PIECE » !

👉Abonnez-vous à notre chaîne pour plus de contenu : @OnePieceOfficialENG

#ONEPIECE #Elbaph #Trailer #Anime #Luffy #Loki #strawhatcrew #onepieceanime

pt-BR.title: Trailer oficial do Arco de Elbaph | 5 de abril de 2026 | ONE PIECE
pt-BR.description:
A transmissão do anime ONE PIECE será retomada no Japão com a tripulação zarpando para Elbaph!
5 de abril de 2026, 23h15 (JST)

♪TEMA DE ABERTURA "Luminous" por AiNA THE END

◆ Sinopse
Após uma fuga ousada do Cabeça de Ovo da Ilha do Futuro, o Bando do Chapéu de Palha parte rumo a um destino lendário. Juntamente com os poderosos Piratas Guerreiros Gigantes, eles finalmente chegam a Elbaph, a tão esperada Terra dos Gigantes.

Novos encontros com gigantes e reencontros há muito esperados se desenrolam. Um novo capítulo colossal começa enquanto a tripulação embarca em uma aventura como nenhuma outra, tudo em busca do tesouro supremo, o "ONE PIECE!"

hi.title: एल्बाफ आर्क का आधिकारिक ट्रेलर | 5 अप्रैल, 2026 | वन पीस
hi.description:
जापान में एनीमे वन पीस का प्रसारण फिर से शुरू होगा, जिसमें क्रू एल्बाफ के लिए रवाना होगा!

5 अप्रैल, 2026, रात 11:15 बजे (जेएसटी)

♪ ओपनिंग थीम "ल्यूमिनस" (आइना द्वारा) द एंड

◆ सारांश
फ्यूचर आइलैंड एगहेड से एक साहसिक पलायन के बाद, स्ट्रॉ हैट क्रू एक पौराणिक गंतव्य की ओर निकल पड़ता है। शक्तिशाली जायंट वॉरियर पाइरेट्स के साथ मिलकर, वे अंततः एल्बाफ पहुँचते हैं, जो दिग्गजों की बहुप्रतीक्षित भूमि है।

दिग्गजों के साथ नए मुठभेड़ और लंबे समय से प्रतीक्षित पुनर्मिलन होते हैं। एक विशाल नया अध्याय शुरू होता है जब क्रू एक अभूतपूर्व साहसिक यात्रा पर निकलता है, और यह सब परम खजाने, "वन पीस!" की खोज में होता है।


👉अधिक वीडियो के लिए हमारे चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करें: @OnePieceOfficialENG

Penayangan anime ONE PIECE akan dilanjutkan di Jepang dengan kru berlayar menuju Elbaph!

5 April 2026 23:15 (JST)

♪ LAGU PEMBUKA "Luminous" oleh AiNA THE END

◆ Sinopsis
Setelah melarikan diri dengan berani dari Pulau Masa Depan Egghead, Kru Topi Jerami menetapkan tujuan mereka menuju destinasi legendaris. Bergabung dengan Bajak Laut Prajurit Raksasa yang perkasa, mereka akhirnya mencapai Elbaph, Tanah Para Raksasa yang telah lama ditunggu-tunggu.

Pertemuan baru dengan para Raksasa, dan reuni yang telah lama diharapkan terungkap. Babak baru yang kolosal dimulai saat kru menuju petualangan yang belum pernah terjadi sebelumnya, semuanya dalam pengejaran harta karun utama, "ONE PIECE!"

snippet.title: Dhanyabad Nepali | Badhai Badhai yo deshlai badhai | Dedicated song to Balen & Government | Official
snippet.description:
Aagyat Presents: New Nepali Song 

|| Dhanyabad Nepali | Badhai Badhai Yo Desh Lai Badhai | Balen Song ||

#aagyat #newsong #nepalisong #aagyat #balenshah  #balen  #nepalisong  #newnepalisong  #nepalimusicvideo  
#nepalilovesongs  #nepalisadsongs  #balennews   #NepaliFilmSong 
#nepaliaudiostory  #NepaliVideo #NepaliTrending #NepaliHitSong 
#OfficialSong #OfficialVideo #lovestorysong  #dhanyabad   #EmotionalSong 
#nepalilokgeet  #nepalimodernsong  #nepalimusic  #nepaliviralsong #dhanyabadnepali 
----------------------------------------

Lyrics:

Saath diyeko ma Nepali aamaalai…
Dhanyabaad cha… Nepali janata lai…

Jaya Mahakaali
Jaya Nepal
Saath diyeko ma Nepali aama lai
Dhanyabaad cha sabai Nepali janata lai

Balen! Balen! Balen! Balen!
Purano sab bye bye, aba khel naya
Congress UML Maoist? sabai lai nai nai
Janata ko awaj uthyo sadak dekhi sansad
Aba janata jagyo, sakiyo purano natak
Rabi dai, Balen high high
Janata ko mutuma naya lahar cha bhai
Naya cha party, naya cha sarkar
Aba janata le paaunchha aafno adhikar
“Adhikar!”

“Naya sarkar!”

Gut chaina, loot chaina, aba phut chaina
Desh banaune jimma timilai chhut chaina
Puranaka  para le dukh paaye Sara le
Wakk ra dikk janata timra thotra nara le

Saath diyeko ma Nepali ama lai
Dhanyabaad cha sabai Nepali janataalai

Balen! Balen! Balen!

Naya banos desh, naya paribesh
Bhrashtachar hatos, nahos kunai case
Karnali ka janata aba niras hunu pardaina
Sitomol ko aasma aba bachnu pardaina

“Aba pardaina…”
Himal, pahad, tarai eutai awaj
Bikash ko baato aba khuldai cha aaj
Bichauliya dalal le khaana napawos
Sahid ko ragat kahilyai jana napaos
Sambidhaan sanshodhan? yadi chahinchha bhane gar
Tara janata ko maang puraa garne jimma tero bhar
Saath diyeko ma Nepali aama lai
Dhanyabaad cha sabai Nepali janataalai
Saath diyeko ma…
Dhanyabaad cha… Nepalai


Balen! Balen! Balen! Balen!
Yo desh haamro…
Yo maato haamro…
Aba haamile banaune ho…

“Banaune ho…”

Badhai badhai yo deshlaai badhai
Dui tihai ko Balen sarkarlaai badhai
Janata ko jit ho, yo kunai khel hoina
Aba paribartan aayo, yo sapana hoina
Hath ma shakti, saathma janata
Aba kasaile rokna sakdaina yo yaatra
Itihaas lekhdai cha naya pustale
Nepal uthdai cha aafnai hastaksharle
Saath diyeko ma Nepali aamaalai
Dhanyabaad cha sabai Nepali janataalai

Balen! Balen! Balen! Balen! Balen!!!

Dhanyabaad cha… Nepali janataalai…

Saath diyeko ma Nepali aamaalai…
Dhanyabaad cha… Nepali janata lai…

Jaya Mahakaali
Jaya Nepal
Saath diyeko ma Nepali aama lai
Dhanyabaad cha sabai Nepali janata lai

Balen! Balen! Balen! Balen!
Purano sab bye bye, aba khel naya
Congress UML Maoist? sabai lai nai nai
Janata ko awaj uthyo sadak dekhi sansad
Aba janata jagyo, sakiyo purano natak
Rabi dai, Balen high high
Janata ko mutuma naya lahar cha bhai
Naya cha party, naya cha sarkar
Aba janata le paaunchha aafno adhikar
“Adhikar!”

“Naya sarkar!”

Gut chaina, loot chaina, aba phut chaina
Desh banaune jimma timilai chhut chaina
Puranaka  para le dukh paaye Sara le
Wakk ra dikk janata timra thotra nara le

Saath diyeko ma Nepali ama lai
Dhanyabaad cha sabai Nepali janataalai

Balen! Balen! Balen!

Naya banos desh, naya paribesh
Bhrashtachar hatos, nahos kunai case
Karnali ka janata aba niras hunu pardaina
Sitomol ko aasma aba bachnu pardaina

“Aba pardaina…”
Himal, pahad, tarai eutai awaj
Bikash ko baato aba khuldai cha aaj
Bichauliya dalal le khaana napawos
Sahid ko ragat kahilyai jana napaos
Sambidhaan sanshodhan? yadi chahinchha bhane gar
Tara janata ko maang puraa garne jimma tero bhar
Saath diyeko ma Nepali aama lai
Dhanyabaad cha sabai Nepali janataalai
Saath diyeko ma…
Dhanyabaad cha… Nepalai


Balen! Balen! Balen! Balen!
Yo desh haamro…
Yo maato haamro…
Aba haamile banaune ho…

“Banaune ho…”

Badhai badhai yo deshlaai badhai
Dui tihai ko Balen sarkarlaai badhai

Aba paribartan aayo, yo sapana hoina

🎤 Lyrics: Banjaare - Bairan

[Verse 1]
Ho, manne sambh-sambh rakhe tere jhanjhara ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi chhori bawle se hore
Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere, khaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen koni deti, haaye bairi tanhaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Instrumental]

[Verse 2]
Ho, maarya-maarya phire, dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi ke jeena banjaarе ka?
Khoya rahun yaad teri kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batue mеin rakhun teri sambh ke nishaaniyaan
Tere bina kaal horeya, theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram, dede saanson te rihaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Bridge]
Haan-aan, aan-aan
Haan-aan

[Verse 3]
Je tu thodi ghabraajya, meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re, main aa jaaunga
Todun duniya ki reet re, ke haar re, ke jeet?
Manne chahiye teri preet, main nibha jaaunga
Dekh, bawla banaagi, manne likhna sikhaagi
Haaye, noch-noch khaagi teri bairan judaai manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Aaj tai nibhaun jo si kasam thi khaayi manne
Zindagi saari ya meri tere lekhe laayi manne

snippet.title: Khesari Lal New Song | Roti Garam | Namrita Malla | Shilpi Raj | New Bhojpuri Song | Bhojpuri Gana
snippet.description:
“रोटी गरम” में खेसारी लाल यादव, नम्रिता मल्ला और शिल्पी राज का धमाका छा गइल बा, फुल मस्ती और डांस के साथ अभी देखीं 🚀

Subscribe to our channel for more Bhojpuri Songs:
https://youtube.com/c/SaregamaHumBhojpuri

Audio Credits:
Singers: Khesari Lal Yadav & Shilpi Raj
Music Director: Ajay Singh AJ
Lyrics: Abhishek Babu Yadav (ABY)

Video Credits:
Featuring: Khesari Lal Yadav & Namrita Malla
Video Design & Directed: Sooraj Katoch
DOP: Rahul Yadav
Choreographer: Shoki & Lokesh
Video Edit: Srikanth (ZAV Studio)
AD: Geeta Tamta (Zenith)
Costumes: Reema Katoch (Zai Fashions)
Dancers: Zenith Dance Troupe
Production: Rohit Seth (Zenith)
Associate: Alex
Asst.: Prince Yadav
Focus Puller: Anish
Makeup: Aryan Rajesh
Hair: Sonu
BTS: Chetan, Pujan (ZAV Studio)
Colourist: Govindpuria

Lyrics: 

कोरस:-
देखअ देखअ शर्मीली 
 म्यूजिक ...
देखअ देखअ शर्मीली शर्मीली रंगीली नशीली कटीली छबीली आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल 
हे हे हे ...

Chorus :-
 खुल के बतावअ गोरी कुछ ना छुपावअ गोरी 
सईया ने का का छुवा     ......आ
करअ तारु चोरा चोरी कइसे भइल जोरा जोरी
रतिया में का का हुआ .......    आ

Mukhda: - 
Male  :-
पहिला राती के बतिया बतावअ
बाटे किरिया तु कुछ ना छुपावअ -२

female -
होठवा के होठवा से देहिया के देहिया से 
रुई जैसा नरम किया 
सईया  मोरा सईया मोरा सईया 
नाही सरम किया  
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा रोटी गरम किया 
खाली देखन में लागे भोला कुल्हि करम किया

Male: -
निर्दईया  निर्दईया निर्दईया तोहार बावे  पिया 
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा रोटी गरम किया ..

Female :-
खाली देखन में लागे भोला कुल्हि करम किया ..


Antra: -1
chorus: -
धक धक का धक धक का धक धक जिया करे
जब आके मौका पाके उ कोरा भरे ...

Male: -
कइसे के नैना चार भइल 
कइसे शुरु राते प्यार भइल
कांचे कसइली रहल बदनिया 
कइसे फुला के अनार भइल

Female: -
अँखिया से अँखिया लड़ल रहे 
दिल में बेचैनी बढ़ल रहे 
चुम्मा लेवे में हाय रामा ढाढी गढ़ल रहे  -२
बलमा मोरा बलमा मोरा बलमा बेशरम पिया
जला के जोबन पे ...

Antra: -2
Chorus: -
क ख ग घ पढ़लू ह का 
नाईट फलाइट पे चढ़लू ह का 

Male: -
धीरे धीरे कइसे सीन भइल 
मामला कब रंगीन भइल 
रसगुल्ला जइसन मीठ मीठ  देहिया
कइसे ए  गोरी नमकीन भइल 

Female  :-
कनवा के बाली टूट गईल
होठवा के लाली छुट गईल
फुलवा के डाली पाके भवरा लूट गईल -२
(हम अनाड़ी )
उई मा उई मा उई मा नाही मरम दिया 
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा...

#newbhojpurisong

snippet.description:
Pardeshma Mera Swami (Official Video)| Haribhakta Budhathoki | Tek BC | Rekha Joshi | Santosh Sunar

🎵 Pardeshma Mero Swami | Official Video 🎵

Lyrics & Presentation: Haribhakta Budhathoki

A deeply emotional song that reflects the pain, love, and longing of a wife whose husband is far away in a foreign land. Pardeshma Mero Swami beautifully captures the reality of distance, sacrifice, and unbreakable connection of hearts.

snippet.title: Luki Luki 2.0 |  Vinaya Adhikari| Sunil Chhetri | Ramji Khand & Shanti Shree Pariyar | New Hit Song
snippet.description:
🎵 Luki Luki 2.0 🎵
Feel the rhythm, romance, and upgraded vibes of Luki Luki  ❤️🔥

🎤 Vocal:
Ramji Khand @SingerRamjiKhand 
Shanti Shree Pariyar @ShantiShreePariyar 

✍️ Lyrics:
Vinaya Adhikari
Krishna Lamichhane  @KrishnaLamichhane319 
🎼 Music Compose:
Krishna Lamichhane

🎧 Arrange:
Mahendra Bhandari

🎚️ Recordist:
Sagar Bajurali

🎛️ Mixing/Mastering:
Khadak Bajurali

🏢 Studio:
Malashree

🎭 Artist:
Sunil Chhetri @sunilchhetrinewsong 
Vinaya Adhikari 
Karisma Shrestha 
Asmita Jureli
Juna Karki
Parbati Shrestha
Tirsana Baraili

💄 MUA:
Sushma Pariyar

🎬 Production Manager:
Milan Katwal

🎥 Cinematographer:
Prakash Khadka

💃 Choreographer:
Abi Wagle
Ritesh Sinjali Magar

🖥️ Edit/Color:
Amrit Chapagain

🎞️ Direction:
Sunil Chhetri

📢 Don’t forget to Like, Comment & Share ❤️
🔔 Subscribe for more amazing music!

🎵 लुकी लुकी 2.0 – गीतको बोल 🎵

(थेगो):
हुन्न दायाँबायाँ
केटा: भाग्यमानि रैछु र मैसाब हजुर पायाँ
केटि: भाग्यमानी रैछु र मौसुब हजुर पायाँ

(१ केटा):
कमल फुल टास्से झै हिलैमा
मेरि सानू टास्सिन यो दिलैमा

(२ केटि):
फकाइ फकाइ आडैमा बसाइस्यो
थाहै न दि मायामा फसाइस्यो

(३ केटा):
जब तिम्रो कम्मर लर्कन्छन
ध्यानमा बस्या ऋषिनी फर्कन्छन

(४ केटि):
मरि हत्य तिम्लेनी गर्‍याहौ
राम्री छु र पछाडी पर्‍याहौ

(५ केटा):
मलाइ तिम्रो नजरले हानेको
तिम्लाइ मेरो पिआरले तानेको

(६ केटि):
मुरि हैन रोजेको मानुलाइ
अझै शंका छर केही सानुलाइ

(७ केटा):
अब किन अप्ठ्यारो मान्छ्यौ
यूके आछ्यौ काँ जान्छ्यौ के खान्छ्यौ

(८ केटि):
केटा केटि हरुको हुल जानी
पिज्जा खानि हल्लिने पुल जानि

(९ केटा):
काखमा राख्दै गालामा चुम्नी हो
मेट्रो रेल चढेर घुम्नी हो

(१० केटि):
घुम्न पाउँदा कस्ले नाइ भन्छर
लगे हुन्छ काँ लान मन्छर

#LukiLuki2 #NewNepaliSong #RamjiKhand #ShantiShreePariyar #VinayaAdhikari #SunilChhetri #OfficialMusicVideo

🎧 Powfu, beabadoobee - death bed (coffee for your head) (Lyrics)
🔔 Subscribe & turn on notifications to stay on the Pulse
⬇️ Stream/Download: https://Powfu.lnk.to/ListenID

Follow Powfu
https://www.instagram.com/pow.fu
https://www.facebook.com/PowfuOfficial
https://www.tiktok.com/@pow.fu

📄 Lyrics: Powfu, beabadoobee - death bed (coffee for your head)

Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed
Yeah, I don't wanna fall asleep, I don't wanna pass away
I been thinking of our future 'cause I'll never see those days
I don't know why this has happened, but I probably deserve it
I tried to do my best, but you know that I'm not perfect
I been praying for forgiveness, you've been praying for my health
When I leave this earth, hopin' you'll find someone else
'Cause yeah, we still young, there's so much we haven't done
Getting married, start a family, watch your husband with his son
I wish it could be me, but I won't make it out this bed
I hope I go to heaven so I see you once again
My life was kinda short, but I got so many blessings
Happy you were mine, it sucks that it's all ending
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed (Yeah, aye)
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed (Aye, yeah)
I'm happy that you here with me, I'm sorry if I tear up
When me and you were younger, you would always make me cheer up
Taking goofy videos and walking through the park
You would jump into my arms every time you heard a bark
Cuddle in your sheets, sing me sound asleep
And sneak out through your kitchen at exactly 1:03
Sundays, went to church, on Mondays, watched a movie
Soon, you'll be alone, sorry that you have to lose me
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed

#Powfu #beabadoobee #deathbed #lyrics #lyricvideo #karaoke #pulse #pulsepop

snippet.title: Dil Kehta Hai Chal Unse Mil - 4K Video Song | Kumar Sanu, Alka Yagnik | Aamir Khan, Manisha Koirala
snippet.description:
Dil Kehta Hai Chal Unse Mil - 4K Video Song | Kumar Sanu, Alka Yagnik | Aamir Khan, Manisha Koirala

Song : Dil Kehta Hai 
Singer : Kumar Sanu & Alka Yagnik
Lyrics : Majrooh Sultanpuri
Music : Anu Malik
Director : Mansoor Khan
Producer : Ratan Jain
Star Cast : Aamir Khan, Manisha Koirala.

Song Lyrics-

Dil kehta hai chal unse mil
Uthte hain kadam ruk jaate hain
Dil humko kabhi samjhaata hai
Hum dil ko kabhi samjhaate hai

Dil kehta hai chal unse mil
Uthte hain kadam ruk jaate hain
Dil humko kabhi samjhaata hai
Hum dil ko kabhi samjhaate hai

Hum jab se hain judaa
Ae mere hum nasheen
Yun dekho to mere
Daaman mein kya nahin
Daulat ka chaand hai
Shohrat ki chaandni
Magar tumhe khoke
Lage hai mujhe aisa
Ke tum nahin to kuch bhi nahin
Tum kya jaano ab hum kitna
Dil hi dil mein pachtaate hai
Dil humko kabhi samjhaata hai
Hum dil ko kabhi samjhaate hai

Voh din the kya haseen
Dono the saath mein
Aur baahein aap ki thi
Mere haath mein
Tum hi tum hai sanam
Mere din raat mein
Par itni bulandi pe
Tum ho meri jaan
Aaye na daaman ab haath mein
Paana tumko mumkin hi nahin
Soche bhi to hum ghabraate hai
Dil humko kabhi samjhaata hai
Hum dil ko kabhi samjhaate hai

Dil kehta hai chal unse mil
Uthte hain kadam
Ruk jaate hain
Uthte hain kadam
Ruk jaate hain
Uthte hain kadam
Ruk jaate hain.

snippet.title: Lauv - I Like Me Better (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
👑 Lauv - I Like Me Better (Lyrics)
🎶 Listen on Spotify: http://bit.ly/4c1YIwO
🔥 Help us reach 100,000 subscribers!
🔔 Turn on notifications to stay updated with new uploads!

🎧 Stream & Download: http://smarturl.it/lauv_ilmb

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nearsidehq

×=×=×=×=×  

Lyrics for "Lauv - I Like Me Better"

[Verse 1]
To be young and in love in New York City
To not know who I am but still know that I'm good long as you're here with me
To be drunk and in love in New York City
Midnight into morning coffee, burning through the hours talking
Damn

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time, I'd stay for a long time, 'cause
I like me better when, I like me better when I'm with you

[Verse 2]
I don't know what it is but I got that feeling
Waking up in this bed next to you swear the room, yeah, it got no ceiling
If we lay, let the day just pass us by
I might get to too much talking, I might have to tell you something
Damn

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time, I'd stay for a long time, 'cause
I like me better when, I like me better when I'm with you

[Bridge]
Stay awhile, stay awhile
Stay here with me
Stay awhile, stay awhile, oh
Stay awhile, stay awhile
Stay here with me
Lay here with me, ooh

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you (yes I do, yes I do, babe)
I like me better when I'm with you (oooh noo)
I knew from the first time, I'd stay for a long time, 'cause
I like me better when, I like me better when I'm with you

[Outro]
(I like me, I like me)
(Look who you made me, made me, oh noo)
Better when
I like me better when I'm with you

×=×=×=×=×

snippet.title: PUBG MOBILE RUTHLESS REGIONAL SHOWDOWN S2 GRAND FINALS DAY 2 FT. #BTR #4T #HORAA #BOOM #APG #I8
snippet.description:
Welcome to Ruthless Regional Showdown S2, where some of the best PUBG MOBILE teams clash across intense group battles on the road to championship glory! 


18 teams enter.
Only the strongest survive. ⚔️

👑
 GRAND FINALS — APR 4 – APR 6

▪️18 Teams
▪️3 Days
▪️5 Matches Every Day

⸻

🧭MATCH FORMAT (FINALS)

Each day features cross-group battles:

✅Match 1 — RONDO
✅Match 2 — ERANGEL
✅Match 3 — ERANGEL
✅Match 4 — MIRAMAR
✅Match 5 — MIRAMAR

⸻

⏰
 MATCH SCHEDULE (WIB)

🕔Match 1 — 17:00 WIB
🕠Match 2 — 17:40 WIB
🕕Match 3 — 18:25 WIB
🕖Match 4 — 19:10 WIB
🕗Match 5 — 19:50 WIB

⸻

🔥GRAND FINALS – SLOT LIST

Sentry Symphony Esports (MY)
Voin Esports (ID)
Allstar (MY)
Bigetron by Vitality (ID)
Relic Esports (MY)
Team HAQ (MY)
Vertice (MY)
4SEA Esports (MY)
Team S2 (—)
Alpha Gaming (MN)
Goldenspear (MY)
Boom Esports (ID)
Shadow Esports (ID)
4Thrives Esports (PK)
AS i8 Esports (PK)
Last Survivor (MY)
Horaa Esports (NP)
Team Pandum (ID)

⸻

📺WATCH LIVE

🗓️4 – 6 APRIL
⏰16:30 GMT+7
📍LIVE on Ruthless Hype Esports

Get ready for high-level rotations, intense team fights, clutch moments, and nonstop PUBG MOBILE action! 🔥

snippet.title: Mitta Ror - Sheesha (Lyrics) ft. Swara Verma | Aakhya Mai Aakh Ghali Jo Bairan
snippet.description:
Mitta Ror, Swara Verma - Sheesha
Stream/Download ~

~ MUSIC INFO ~
Song Title : SHEESHA
Starring : Mitta Ror
Singer : Swara Verma & Mitta Ror
Lyricist/composer: Mitta Ror
Music production : Yeah Ishwar
Mix/Master - Baally 

~ Follow Mitta Ror ~
https://www.instagram.com/official_mitta_ror

~ Lyrics ~ Mitta Ror - Sheesha ft. Swara Verma 
Teri Aage Pichhe Laage Sun Daura Chhori Ka
Rang Tere Gela Match Hove Gora Chhori Ka
Jo Rakhega Bacha Ke Duniya Ki Nazra Te
Tere Kar Deyun Hawaale Kala Dora Chhori Ka
Jibb Te Re Pakda Yo Hath Tane Mera
Thodi Thodi Main To Ghabrandi Fir Su

Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Firu Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Firu Su
Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Firu Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su

Tere Paida Mein Ye Paid Meri Jaan Laag Gi
Teri Pasand Ke Suit Main Siman Laag Gi
Oh Din Dholi Mein Tu Le Gaya Meri Jaan Kadh Ke
Pyar Aale Gaane Main To Gaan Laag Gi

Tere Paida Mein Ye Paid Meri Jaan Laag Gi
Teri Pasand Ke Suit Main Siman Laag Gi
Oh Din Dholi Mein Tu Le Gaya Meri Jaan Kadh Ke
Pyar Aale Gaane Main To Gaan Laag Gi
Ho Chadheya Isa Pyaar Aala Bhut Merepe
Teri Photo Wallpaper Pe Landi Fir Su

Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su

Aakhya Me Aankh Mane Ghali Jo Beran
Teri Jhuk Gayi Thi Aankh Sharma Ke Ne Beran
Gora Gora Chaam Tera Kaale Kaale Baal Tere
Dub Gaya Mai Billi Billi Aankhya Mein Bairan

Teri Hasi Ke Hasi Jama Zeher Chhori Re
Is Chhore Ke Dil Pe Dhave Keher Chhori Re
Kade Rolya Me Pair Bhi Na Tekya Manne
Tere Paache Paale Baithe Ghane Bair Chhori Re

Tu Fursat Te Ghadi I Think Meri Jaan
Honth Tere Lal Gaal Pink Meri Jaan
Paida Pe Paid Tu Mila Ke Chaliye
Teri Gel Deun Gaane Main Sync Meri Jaan

Aankhya Re Maarya Tane Teer Chore Re
Mere Dil Ne Yu Gaya Jama Cheer Chore Re
Ho Teri Dhan Daulat Pe Manne Kuchh Konya Lena
Manne Dil Ka Tu Laage Se Ameer Chhore Re

Ho Aankhya Re Maarya Tane Teer Chore Re
Mere Dil Ne Yu Gaya Jama Cheer Chore Re
Ho Teri Dhan Daulat Pe Manne Kuchh Konya Lena
Mane Dil Ka Tu Lage Se Ameer Chhore Re
Teri Meri Jodi Ke Re Laage Na Nazar
Main To Mandira Me Dive Makha Landi Fir Su

Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su

Kise Paache Itne Na Phhire
Jitne Tere Pichhe Bhatak Rahe Hai
Laa Ke Chhati Se Keh De Na I Love You
Chhore Tere Ke Saans Atak Rahe Hai

Ho Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su

snippet.title: Ae Ajnabee (Official Music Video) - Aditya Rikhari, Ravator, Kutle Khan | Coke Studio Bharat
snippet.description:
Coke Studio Bharat Season 4 opens with #AeAjnabee, a melodic journey into the heart of longing. Love may change its language, but that timeless ache for connection remains. Aditya Rikhari's warm vocals meet Kutle Khan's iconic Rajasthani folk sound, all brought together by producer and DJ, Ravator. This track bridges generations; letting the depth of folk breathe within pop's groovy sound. It's for those who remember whispered poetry and those who send late-night texts - a celebration of modern romance rooted in emotion.

Listen to Ae Ajnabee: http://UMGI.lnk.to/AeAjnabee  

CREDITS

Coke Studio Bharat Season 4 opens with #AeAjnabee, a melodic journey into the heart of longing. Love may change its language, but that timeless ache for connection remains. Aditya Rikhari's warm vocals meet Kutle Khan's iconic Rajasthani folk sound, all brought together by producer and DJ, Ravator. This track bridges generations; letting the depth of folk breathe within pop's groovy sound. snippet.title: ROBLOX GUESS THE NUMBER..
snippet.description:
Today I played roblox guess the number! Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Merch: https://foltyn.shop/

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

Gadżety: https://foltyn.shop/

Dołącz do tego kanału, aby uzyskać dostęp do bonusów:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Media społecznościowe--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Grupa Roblox: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Nazwa w Roblox: TheRealFoltyn

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Czym jest Roblox? ROBLOX to wirtualny plac zabaw i warsztat online, gdzie dzieci w każdym wieku mogą bezpiecznie wchodzić w interakcje, tworzyć, bawić się i uczyć. Wyjątkowość ROBLOX polega na tym, że praktycznie wszystko w grze jest projektowane i tworzone przez członków społeczności. ROBLOX jest przeznaczony dla osób w wieku od 13 do 18 lat, ale jest otwarty dla osób w każdym wieku. Każdy gracz zaczyna od wyboru awatara i nadania mu tożsamości. Następnie może odkrywać ROBLOX — wchodząc w interakcje z innymi poprzez czatowanie, granie w gry lub współpracę przy kreatywnych projektach. Każdy gracz otrzymuje również własny, niezagospodarowany kawałek ziemi wraz z wirtualnym zestawem narzędzi, za pomocą którego może zaprojektować i zbudować cokolwiek zechce — czy to nawigacyjny wieżowiec, działający helikopter, gigantyczny flipper, grę wieloosobową „Zdobądź Flagę” czy inne, jeszcze niewyobrażalne dzieło. Ta pierwsza wirtualna działka jest darmowa. Uczestnicząc w projekcie i budując fajne rzeczy, członkowie ROBLOX mogą zdobywać specjalne odznaki, a także dolary ROBLOX („Robuxy”). Mogą oni również przeglądać katalog online, aby kupić ubrania i akcesoria dla awatarów, a także wysokiej jakości materiały budowlane, interaktywne komponenty i działające mechanizmy.

#Roblox #foltyn

ar.description:

--حسابات التواصل الاجتماعي--

ديسكورد: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

مجموعة روبلوكس: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

اسم المستخدم على روبلوكس: TheRealFoltyn

إنستغرام: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

تويتر: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

ما هي روبلوكس؟ روبلوكس عبارة عن منصة ألعاب افتراضية تفاعلية، حيث يمكن للأطفال من جميع الأعمار التفاعل بأمان، والإبداع، والاستمتاع، والتعلم. ما يميز ROBLOX هو أن كل شيء تقريبًا فيه مصمم ومُنشأ من قِبل أعضاء المجتمع. صُمم ROBLOX للفئة العمرية من 13 إلى 18 عامًا، ولكنه متاح للجميع. يبدأ كل لاعب باختيار شخصية افتراضية وتحديد هويتها. بعد ذلك، يمكنه استكشاف عالم ROBLOX والتفاعل مع الآخرين من خلال الدردشة أو لعب الألعاب أو التعاون في مشاريع إبداعية. يُمنح كل لاعب أيضًا قطعة أرض افتراضية غير مطورة، بالإضافة إلى مجموعة أدوات افتراضية لتصميم وبناء أي شيء، سواء كان ناطحة سحاب قابلة للاستكشاف، أو طائرة هليكوبتر عاملة، أو آلة بينبول عملاقة، أو لعبة "الاستيلاء على العلم" متعددة اللاعبين، أو أي ابتكار آخر لم يخطر على بال أحد. هذه القطعة الأولى من الأرض الافتراضية مجانية. من خلال المشاركة وبناء أشياء رائعة، يمكن لأعضاء ROBLOX ربح شارات مميزة، بالإضافة إلى عملة ROBLOX (Robux). وبدورهم، يمكنهم التسوق من المتجر الإلكتروني لشراء ملابس وإكسسوارات لشخصياتهم الافتراضية، بالإضافة إلى مواد بناء مميزة، ومكونات تفاعلية، وآليات عاملة.

#روبلوكس دفولتين

de-DE.title: ROBLOX ZAHLEN ERRATEN..
de-DE.description:
Heute habe ich Roblox „Zahlenraten“ gespielt! Schaut euch das ganze Video an, um zu erfahren, was passiert.

Merch: https://foltyn.shop/

Werdet Mitglied dieses Kanals und sichert euch exklusive Vorteile:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Social Media--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox-Gruppe: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox-Name: TheRealFoltyn

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Was ist Roblox? Roblox ist ein virtueller Online-Spielplatz und eine Werkstatt, in der Kinder jeden Alters sicher interagieren, kreativ sein, Spaß haben und lernen können. Das Besondere an ROBLOX ist, dass praktisch alles von Mitgliedern der Community entworfen und gebaut wird. ROBLOX ist zwar für 13- bis 18-Jährige gedacht, steht aber allen Altersgruppen offen. Jeder Spieler beginnt mit der Auswahl eines Avatars und gibt ihm eine Identität. Anschließend können sie ROBLOX erkunden und mit anderen chatten, Spiele spielen oder gemeinsam an kreativen Projekten arbeiten. Jeder Spieler erhält außerdem ein eigenes, unbebautes Grundstück sowie eine virtuelle Werkzeugkiste, mit der er alles Mögliche entwerfen und bauen kann – sei es ein begehbarer Wolkenkratzer, ein funktionierender Hubschrauber, ein riesiger Flipperautomat, ein Multiplayer-„Capture the Flag“-Spiel oder eine andere, noch nie dagewesene Kreation. Das erste virtuelle Grundstück ist kostenlos. Durch die Teilnahme und das Erstellen cooler Inhalte können ROBLOX-Mitglieder spezielle Abzeichen und ROBLOX-Dollar („Robux“) verdienen. Damit können sie im Online-Katalog Avatar-Kleidung und -Accessoires sowie Premium-Baumaterialien, interaktive Komponenten und funktionierende Mechanismen kaufen.

#Roblox #foltyn

ரோப்லாக்ஸ் என்றால் என்ன? ரோப்லாக்ஸ் என்பது ஒரு ஆன்லைன் மெய்நிகர் விளையாட்டுத் தளம் மற்றும் பட்டறை ஆகும், இங்கு அனைத்து வயது குழந்தைகளும் பாதுகாப்பாகப் பழகலாம், உருவாக்கலாம், மகிழலாம் மற்றும் கற்றுக்கொள்ளலாம். ROBLOX-இல் உள்ள அனைத்தும் சமூக உறுப்பினர்களால் வடிவமைக்கப்பட்டு உருவாக்கப்படுகின்றன என்பதில் இது தனித்துவமானது. ROBLOX 13 முதல் 18 வயதுடையவர்களுக்காக வடிவமைக்கப்பட்டுள்ளது, ஆனால் இது எல்லா வயதினருக்கும் திறந்திருக்கும். ஒவ்வொரு வீரரும் ஒரு அவதாரத்தைத் தேர்ந்தெடுத்து அதற்கு ஒரு அடையாளத்தை வழங்குவதன் மூலம் தொடங்குகிறார்கள். பின்னர் அவர்கள் ROBLOX-ஐ ஆராயலாம் — அரட்டையடிப்பது, விளையாடுவது அல்லது ஆக்கப்பூர்வமான திட்டங்களில் இணைந்து பணியாற்றுவது போன்றவற்றின் மூலம் மற்றவர்களுடன் தொடர்பு கொள்ளலாம். ஒவ்வொரு வீரருக்கும், பயணிக்கக்கூடிய வானளாவிய கட்டிடம், இயங்கும் ஹெலிகாப்டர், ஒரு பெரிய பின்தட்டு இயந்திரம், பல வீரர்கள் விளையாடும் "கொடியைக் கைப்பற்று" விளையாட்டு அல்லது இதுவரை கனவு காணப்படாத வேறு ஏதேனும் ஒரு படைப்பு என எதையும் வடிவமைத்து உருவாக்க, ஒரு மெய்நிகர் கருவிப்பெட்டியுடன், மேம்படுத்தப்படாத சொந்த நிலமும் வழங்கப்படுகிறது. இந்த முதல் மெய்நிகர் நிலத்துண்டுக்கு எந்தக் கட்டணமும் இல்லை. பங்கேற்பதன் மூலமும், அருமையான பொருட்களை உருவாக்குவதன் மூலமும், ROBLOX உறுப்பினர்கள் சிறப்புப் பதக்கங்களையும் ROBLOX டாலர்களையும் ("Robux") சம்பாதிக்கலாம். இதன் மூலம், அவர்கள் ஆன்லைன் பட்டியலில் இருந்து அவதார் ஆடைகள் மற்றும் அணிகலன்கள், அத்துடன் பிரீமியம் கட்டுமானப் பொருட்கள், ஊடாடும் கூறுகள் மற்றும் இயங்கும் இயந்திர அமைப்புகளை வாங்கலாம்.

#ரோப்லாக்ஸ் #ஃபோல்டின்

Что такое Roblox? ROBLOX — это онлайн-виртуальная игровая площадка и мастерская, где дети всех возрастов могут безопасно общаться, творить, развлекаться и учиться. Его уникальность заключается в том, что практически всё в ROBLOX создаётся и разрабатывается членами сообщества. ROBLOX предназначен для подростков от 13 до 18 лет, но открыт для людей всех возрастов. Каждый игрок начинает с выбора аватара и присвоения ему имени. Затем он может исследовать ROBLOX — взаимодействовать с другими, общаясь в чате, играя в игры или сотрудничая над творческими проектами. Каждому игроку также предоставляется собственный участок необработанной виртуальной земли вместе с виртуальным набором инструментов, с помощью которого можно проектировать и строить что угодно — будь то небоскрёб, по которому можно перемещаться, работающий вертолёт, гигантский пинбол, многопользовательская игра «Захват флага» или какое-либо другое, ещё не придуманное творение. Первый участок виртуальной земли предоставляется бесплатно. Участвуя и создавая интересные вещи, участники ROBLOX могут зарабатывать специальные значки, а также виртуальную валюту ROBLOX («Robux»). В свою очередь, они могут просматривать онлайн-каталог, чтобы приобрести одежду и аксессуары для аватаров, а также премиальные строительные материалы, интерактивные компоненты и рабочие механизмы.

로블록스란 무엇일까요? 로블록스는 모든 연령대의 아이들이 안전하게 소통하고, 만들고, 즐기고, 배울 수 있는 온라인 가상 놀이터이자 작업 공간입니다. ROBLOX는 거의 모든 콘텐츠를 커뮤니티 회원들이 직접 디자인하고 제작한다는 점에서 독특합니다. ROBLOX는 13세에서 18세 사이의 사용자를 위해 설계되었지만, 모든 연령대의 사람들이 이용할 수 있습니다. 모든 플레이어는 아바타를 선택하고 자신만의 정체성을 부여하는 것으로 시작합니다. 그런 다음 ROBLOX를 탐험하며 다른 사용자와 채팅하고, 게임을 플레이하고, 창의적인 프로젝트를 공동 작업하는 등 다양한 방식으로 소통할 수 있습니다. 각 플레이어에게는 개발되지 않은 가상 토지와 가상 도구 상자가 제공되어 무엇이든 디자인하고 만들 수 있습니다. 실제로 움직일 수 있는 고층 빌딩, 작동하는 헬리콥터, 거대한 핀볼 기계, 멀티플레이어 "깃발 뺏기" 게임, 또는 아직 상상조차 하지 못한 창작물까지 만들어낼 수 있습니다. 이 첫 번째 가상 토지는 무료로 제공됩니다. ROBLOX 회원들은 참여하고 멋진 작품을 만들면서 특별 배지와 ROBLOX 달러("Robux")를 획득할 수 있습니다. 획득한 Robux로는 온라인 카탈로그에서 아바타 의상과 액세서리, 프리미엄 건축 자재, 상호 작용 구성 요소, 작동 메커니즘 등을 구매할 수 있습니다.

Qu'est-ce que Roblox ? Roblox est un univers virtuel en ligne où les enfants de tous âges peuvent interagir, créer, s'amuser et apprendre en toute sécurité. ROBLOX est unique en son genre : presque tout y est conçu et construit par les membres de la communauté. Conçu pour les 13-18 ans, ROBLOX est cependant ouvert à tous. Chaque joueur commence par choisir un avatar et lui donner une identité. Il peut ensuite explorer ROBLOX et interagir avec les autres en discutant, en jouant ou en collaborant sur des projets créatifs. Chaque joueur reçoit également son propre terrain virtuel non aménagé, ainsi qu'une boîte à outils virtuelle pour concevoir et construire tout ce qu'il souhaite : un gratte-ciel navigable, un hélicoptère fonctionnel, un flipper géant, un jeu multijoueur de « Capture du drapeau » ou toute autre création encore inimaginée. Ce premier terrain virtuel est gratuit. En participant et en créant des choses originales, les membres de ROBLOX peuvent gagner des badges spéciaux et des ROBLOX dollars (« Robux »). Ils peuvent ensuite utiliser ces Robux pour acheter des vêtements et des accessoires pour leur avatar, ainsi que des matériaux de construction premium, des composants interactifs et des mécanismes fonctionnels.

O que é Roblox? ROBLOX é um playground e oficina virtual online, onde crianças de todas as idades podem interagir, criar, se divertir e aprender com segurança. O que torna o ROBLOX único é o fato de praticamente tudo nele ser projetado e construído por membros da comunidade. O ROBLOX é voltado para jovens de 13 a 18 anos, mas é aberto a pessoas de todas as idades. Cada jogador começa escolhendo um avatar e dando a ele uma identidade. Em seguida, pode explorar o ROBLOX — interagindo com outros jogadores por meio de bate-papo, jogos ou colaborando em projetos criativos. Cada jogador também recebe seu próprio terreno virtual não desenvolvido, juntamente com uma caixa de ferramentas virtual para projetar e construir qualquer coisa — seja um arranha-céu navegável, um helicóptero funcional, uma máquina de pinball gigante, um jogo multiplayer de "Capture a Bandeira" ou alguma outra criação ainda não imaginada. Não há custo para este primeiro terreno virtual. Ao participar e construir coisas legais, os membros do ROBLOX podem ganhar distintivos especiais, bem como dólares ROBLOX ("Robux"). Por sua vez, eles podem usar os Robux para comprar roupas e acessórios para seus avatares no catálogo online, além de materiais de construção premium, componentes interativos e mecanismos funcionais.

রোবলক্স কী? রোবলক্স হলো একটি অনলাইন ভার্চুয়াল খেলার মাঠ এবং কর্মশালা, যেখানে সব বয়সের শিশুরা নিরাপদে একে অপরের সাথে যোগাযোগ করতে, কিছু তৈরি করতে, মজা করতে এবং শিখতে পারে। এর বিশেষত্ব হলো, ROBLOX-এর প্রায় সবকিছুই কমিউনিটির সদস্যদের দ্বারা ডিজাইন ও নির্মাণ করা হয়। ROBLOX মূলত ১৩ থেকে ১৮ বছর বয়সীদের জন্য তৈরি, কিন্তু এটি সব বয়সের মানুষের জন্য উন্মুক্ত। প্রত্যেক খেলোয়াড় একটি অ্যাভাটার বেছে নিয়ে এবং সেটিকে একটি পরিচয় দিয়ে খেলা শুরু করে। এরপর তারা ROBLOX-এ ঘুরে বেড়াতে পারে — চ্যাট করে, গেম খেলে বা সৃজনশীল প্রকল্পে সহযোগিতা করে অন্যদের সাথে যোগাযোগ স্থাপন করতে পারে। প্রত্যেক খেলোয়াড়কে তাদের নিজস্ব এক টুকরো অনুন্নত জমি এবং একটি ভার্চুয়াল টুলবক্সও দেওয়া হয়, যা দিয়ে তারা যেকোনো কিছু ডিজাইন ও নির্মাণ করতে পারে — তা হতে পারে চলাচলযোগ্য একটি আকাশচুম্বী ভবন, একটি সচল হেলিকপ্টার, একটি বিশাল পিনবল মেশিন, একটি মাল্টিপ্লেয়ার “ক্যাপচার দ্য ফ্ল্যাগ” গেম বা অন্য কোনো অকল্পনীয় সৃষ্টি। এই প্রথম ভার্চুয়াল জমির প্লটটির জন্য কোনো খরচ নেই। অংশগ্রহণ করে এবং চমৎকার জিনিস তৈরি করে, ROBLOX-এর সদস্যরা বিশেষ ব্যাজ এবং ROBLOX ডলার (“Robux”) অর্জন করতে পারে। এর মাধ্যমে, তারা অনলাইন ক্যাটালগ থেকে অ্যাভাটারের পোশাক ও আনুষঙ্গিক জিনিসপত্র, সেইসাথে প্রিমিয়াম নির্মাণ সামগ্রী, ইন্টারেক্টিভ উপাদান এবং সচল যন্ত্রাংশ কিনতে পারে।

#রোব্লক্স #ফলটিন

Cos'è Roblox? ROBLOX è un parco giochi e laboratorio virtuale online, dove i ragazzi di tutte le età possono interagire, creare, divertirsi e imparare in tutta sicurezza. La sua particolarità è che praticamente tutto su ROBLOX è progettato e costruito dai membri della community. ROBLOX è pensato per ragazzi dai 13 ai 18 anni, ma è aperto a persone di tutte le età. Ogni giocatore inizia scegliendo un avatar e dandogli un'identità. Può quindi esplorare ROBLOX, interagendo con gli altri tramite chat, giocando o collaborando a progetti creativi. Ogni giocatore riceve anche un proprio appezzamento di terreno virtuale non edificato, insieme a una cassetta degli attrezzi virtuale con cui progettare e costruire qualsiasi cosa: un grattacielo navigabile, un elicottero funzionante, un flipper gigante, un gioco multiplayer "Cattura la bandiera" o qualsiasi altra creazione ancora da immaginare. Questo primo appezzamento di terreno virtuale è gratuito. Partecipando e costruendo cose interessanti, i membri di ROBLOX possono guadagnare badge speciali e dollari ROBLOX ("Robux"). A loro volta, possono utilizzare questi Robux per acquistare abbigliamento e accessori per il proprio avatar, nonché materiali da costruzione di alta qualità, componenti interattivi e meccanismi funzionanti dal catalogo online.

#Roblox #foltyn

ROBLOX unik karena hampir semua hal di dalamnya dirancang dan dibangun oleh anggota komunitas. ROBLOX dirancang untuk usia 13 hingga 18 tahun, tetapi terbuka untuk semua usia. Roblox क्या है? ROBLOX एक ऑनलाइन वर्चुअल प्लेग्राउंड और वर्कशॉप है, जहाँ सभी उम्र के बच्चे सुरक्षित रूप से एक-दूसरे से जुड़ सकते हैं, कुछ नया बना सकते हैं, मज़े कर सकते हैं और सीख सकते हैं। ROBLOX की खासियत यह है कि इस पर लगभग सब कुछ समुदाय के सदस्यों द्वारा ही डिज़ाइन और निर्मित किया जाता है। ROBLOX 13 से 18 वर्ष की आयु के लोगों के लिए डिज़ाइन किया गया है, लेकिन यह सभी उम्र के लोगों के लिए खुला है। प्रत्येक खिलाड़ी एक अवतार चुनकर और उसे एक पहचान देकर शुरुआत करता है। फिर वे ROBLOX को एक्सप्लोर कर सकते हैं - दूसरों के साथ चैट करके, गेम खेलकर या रचनात्मक परियोजनाओं पर सहयोग करके बातचीत कर सकते हैं। प्रत्येक खिलाड़ी को एक अविकसित वर्चुअल ज़मीन का टुकड़ा और एक वर्चुअल टूलबॉक्स भी दिया जाता है, जिससे वे कुछ भी डिज़ाइन और निर्माण कर सकते हैं - चाहे वह चलने-फिरने योग्य गगनचुंबी इमारत हो, एक चलता-फिरता हेलीकॉप्टर हो, एक विशाल पिनबॉल मशीन हो, एक मल्टीप्लेयर "कैप्चर द फ्लैग" गेम हो या कोई अन्य, अभी तक कल्पना भी न की गई रचना। इस पहले वर्चुअल ज़मीन के टुकड़े के लिए कोई कीमत नहीं है। भाग लेकर और शानदार चीज़ें बनाकर, ROBLOX सदस्य विशेष बैज और ROBLOX डॉलर ("रोबक्स") कमा सकते हैं। बदले में, वे ऑनलाइन कैटलॉग से अवतार के कपड़े और एक्सेसरीज़ के साथ-साथ प्रीमियम निर्माण सामग्री, इंटरैक्टिव कंपोनेंट और काम करने वाले मैकेनिज़्म खरीद सकते हैं।

מה זה רובלוקס? רובלוקס הוא מגרש משחקים וירטואלי מקוון וסדנה, שבו ילדים בכל הגילאים יכולים לתקשר, ליצור, ליהנות וללמוד בבטחה. זה ייחודי בכך שכמעט כל דבר ב-ROBLOX מתוכנן ונבנה על ידי חברי הקהילה. ROBLOX מיועד לגילאי 13 עד 18, אך פתוח לאנשים בכל הגילאים. כל שחקן מתחיל בבחירת אווטאר ומתן זהות לו. לאחר מכן הם יכולים לחקור את ROBLOX - לתקשר עם אחרים על ידי צ'אט, משחקי משחקים או שיתוף פעולה בפרויקטים יצירתיים. כל שחקן מקבל גם פיסת קרקע לא מפותחת משלו יחד עם ארגז כלים וירטואלי שבעזרתו ניתן לעצב ולבנות כל דבר - בין אם זה גורד שחקים ניווט, מסוק פעיל, מכונת פינבול ענקית, משחק מרובה משתתפים "לכידת הדגל" או יצירה אחרת שטרם הומצאה. אין עלות עבור חלקת אדמה וירטואלית ראשונה זו. על ידי השתתפות ובניית דברים מגניבים, חברי ROBLOX יכולים להרוויח תגים מיוחדים וכן דולרים של ROBLOX ("Robux"). בתורם, הם יכולים לקנות בקטלוג המקוון בגדים ואביזרים לאווטארים, כמו גם חומרי בנייה איכותיים, רכיבים אינטראקטיביים ומנגנונים פועלים.

రోబ్లాక్స్ అంటే ఏమిటి? రోబ్లాక్స్ అనేది ఒక ఆన్‌లైన్ వర్చువల్ ప్లేగ్రౌండ్ మరియు వర్క్‌షాప్, ఇక్కడ అన్ని వయసుల పిల్లలు సురక్షితంగా ఒకరితో ఒకరు సంభాషించుకోవచ్చు, సృష్టించుకోవచ్చు, ఆనందించవచ్చు మరియు నేర్చుకోవచ్చు. ROBLOX లో దాదాపు ప్రతిదీ కమ్యూనిటీ సభ్యులచే రూపొందించబడి, నిర్మించబడటమే దీని ప్రత్యేకత. ROBLOX 13 నుండి 18 సంవత్సరాల వయస్సు గల వారి కోసం రూపొందించబడింది, కానీ ఇది అన్ని వయసుల వారికి అందుబాటులో ఉంటుంది. ప్రతి ఆటగాడు ఒక అవతార్‌ను ఎంచుకుని, దానికి ఒక గుర్తింపును ఇవ్వడం ద్వారా ప్రారంభిస్తాడు. ఆ తర్వాత వారు చాటింగ్ చేయడం, ఆటలు ఆడటం లేదా సృజనాత్మక ప్రాజెక్టులపై సహకరించుకోవడం ద్వారా ఇతరులతో సంభాషిస్తూ ROBLOX ను అన్వేషించవచ్చు. ప్రతి ఆటగాడికి వారి స్వంత అభివృద్ధి చెందని భూభాగంతో పాటు, ఒక వర్చువల్ టూల్‌బాక్స్ కూడా ఇవ్వబడుతుంది. దానితో వారు దేనినైనా డిజైన్ చేసి నిర్మించవచ్చు — అది ప్రయాణించగల ఆకాశహర్మ్యం కావచ్చు, పనిచేసే హెలికాప్టర్ కావచ్చు, ఒక పెద్ద పిన్‌బాల్ మెషిన్ కావచ్చు, మల్టీప్లేయర్ “క్యాప్చర్ ది ఫ్లాగ్” గేమ్ కావచ్చు లేదా ఇంకా ఊహించని మరేదైనా సృష్టి కావచ్చు. ఈ మొదటి వర్చువల్ భూభాగానికి ఎటువంటి ఖర్చు ఉండదు. పాల్గొనడం ద్వారా మరియు అద్భుతమైన వస్తువులను నిర్మించడం ద్వారా, ROBLOX సభ్యులు ప్రత్యేక బ్యాడ్జ్‌లతో పాటు ROBLOX డాలర్లను (“రోబక్స్”) సంపాదించవచ్చు. దీనికి ప్రతిగా, వారు ఆన్‌లైన్ కేటలాగ్‌లో అవతార్ దుస్తులు మరియు యాక్సెసరీలతో పాటు ప్రీమియం నిర్మాణ సామగ్రి, ఇంటరాక్టివ్ భాగాలు మరియు పనిచేసే యంత్రాంగాలను కొనుగోలు చేయవచ్చు.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

Що таке Roblox? ROBLOX — це віртуальний онлайн-майстерня та майстерня, де діти різного віку можуть безпечно взаємодіяти, творити, розважатися та навчатися. Він унікальний тим, що практично все в ROBLOX розроблено та побудовано членами спільноти. ROBLOX розроблений для дітей віком від 13 до 18 років, але відкритий для людей будь-якого віку. Кожен гравець починає з вибору аватара та надання йому ідентичності. Потім вони можуть досліджувати ROBLOX — взаємодіяти з іншими через чат, ігри або співпрацювати над творчими проектами. Кожному гравцеві також надається власний шматок незабудованої нерухомості разом із віртуальним набором інструментів, за допомогою якого можна проектувати та будувати що завгодно — будь то хмарочос, яким можна керувати, робочий гелікоптер, гігантський пінбольний автомат, багатокористувацька гра «Захоплення прапора» чи якесь інше, ще не вигадане творіння. Ця перша ділянка віртуальної землі безкоштовна. Беручи участь та будуючи круті речі, учасники ROBLOX можуть заробляти спеціальні значки, а також долари ROBLOX («Robux»). У свою чергу, вони можуть купувати одяг та аксесуари для аватарів в онлайн-каталозі, а також преміальні будівельні матеріали, інтерактивні компоненти та робочі механізми.


#Roblox #foltyn

Lyrics:
Take your shoes off
Thank you for dinner baby
I had a really great time
I really loved the conversation
And that your car self drives
The pineapple air freshener
Is my favorite kind
Well this is me but
if you have time
Do you want the house tour?
I could take you to the first, second, third floor
And I promise none of this is a metaphor
I just want you to come inside
Baby what's mine is now yours
The couch is really comfy comfy
Got some Chips Ahoy
If you're hungry hungry
You don't need to love me, love me, love me
I'm just so proud of my design
(to dim the lights)
Do you want the house tour?
I could take you to the first, second, third floor
And I promise none of this is a metaphor
I just want you to come inside
But never enter through the back door
House tour
Yeah, I spent a little fortune on the waxed floors
We can be a little reckless cause it's insured
I'm pleasured to be your hot tour guide
Baby what's mine is now yours
(Oh baby if you come inside, if you come inside
I might let you uh)
My house is on pretty girl avenue
My house was especially built for you
Some say it's a place where your dreams come true
My house
Could be your house too!
So um
Are you coming in or what?

#SabrinaCarpenter #HouseTour #MansBestFriend

बोल:
अपने जूते उतार दो
रात के खाने के लिए धन्यवाद बेबी
मुझे बहुत अच्छा लगा
मुझे बातचीत बहुत पसंद आई
और तुम्हारी कार सेल्फ ड्राइव
पाइनएप्पल एयर फ्रेशनर
मेरा पसंदीदा है
खैर, ये मैं हूँ लेकिन
अगर तुम्हारे पास समय हो
तो क्या तुम चाहोगी घर का दौरा?
मैं आपको पहली, दूसरी, तीसरी मंज़िल पर ले जा सकती हूँ
और मैं वादा करती हूँ कि यह सब कोई रूपक नहीं है
मैं बस चाहती हूँ कि आप अंदर आएँ
बेबी, जो मेरा है वह अब तुम्हारा है
सोफा बहुत आरामदायक है
मेरे पास चिप्स अहोय हैं
अगर आपको भूख लगी है
आपको मुझे प्यार करने की ज़रूरत नहीं है
मुझे बस अपने डिज़ाइन पर गर्व है
(रोशनी धीमी करते हुए)
क्या आप घर का दौरा करना चाहती हैं?

मैं तुम्हें पहली, दूसरी, तीसरी मंज़िल तक ले जा सकती हूँ
और मैं वादा करती हूँ कि यह सब कोई रूपक नहीं है
मैं बस चाहती हूँ कि तुम अंदर आओ
लेकिन पीछे के दरवाज़े से कभी मत आना
घर का दौरा
हाँ, मैंने पॉलिश किए हुए फ़र्श पर काफ़ी पैसा खर्च किया है
हम थोड़े बेपरवाह हो सकते हैं क्योंकि इसका बीमा है
मुझे तुम्हारा हॉट टूर गाइड बनकर खुशी हो रही है
बेबी, जो मेरा है वो अब तुम्हारा है
(ओह बेबी, अगर तुम अंदर आओ, अगर तुम अंदर आओ
तो शायद मैं तुम्हें...)
मेरा घर प्रीटी गर्ल एवेन्यू पर है
मेरा घर खास तुम्हारे लिए बना है
कुछ लोग कहते हैं कि यह वो जगह है जहाँ तुम्हारे सपने सच होते हैं
मेरा घर
तुम्हारा घर भी हो सकता है!

तो...
क्या तुम अंदर आ रही हो या नहीं?

#SabrinaCarpenter #HouseTour #MansBestFriend

Songtext:
Zieh deine Schuhe aus
Danke für das Abendessen, Baby
Ich hatte eine richtig schöne Zeit
Das Gespräch war super
Und dass dein Auto von selbst fährt
Der Ananas-Lufterfrischer
ist mein Lieblingsduft
So, das bin ich, aber
wenn du Zeit hast
Möchtest du eine Hausführung?

Ich könnte dich ins erste, zweite, dritte Stockwerk mitnehmen.
Und ich verspreche dir, das ist keine Metapher.
Ich will nur, dass du reinkommst.
Baby, was mir gehört, gehört jetzt dir.
Die Couch ist so richtig gemütlich.
Ich hab Chips Ahoy.
Wenn du richtig Hunger hast,
du musst mich nicht lieben, lieben, lieben.
Ich bin einfach so stolz auf mein Design.

(Licht dimmen)
Willst du eine Hausführung?

Ich könnte dich ins erste, zweite, dritte Stockwerk mitnehmen.
Und ich verspreche dir, das ist keine Metapher.
Ich möchte einfach, dass du reinkommst.
Aber geh niemals durch die Hintertür.
Hausbesichtigung
Ja, ich habe ein kleines Vermögen für die gewachsten Böden ausgegeben.
Wir können ein bisschen leichtsinnig sein, denn es ist versichert.
Es freut mich, deine heiße Tourguide zu sein.
Baby, was mir gehört, gehört jetzt dir.
(Oh Baby, wenn du reinkommst, wenn du reinkommst, lasse ich dich vielleicht rein.)
Mein Haus liegt in der Straße der hübschen Mädchen.
Mein Haus wurde speziell für dich gebaut.
Man sagt, es ist ein Ort, an dem Träume wahr werden.
Mein Haus
Könnte auch dein Haus sein!

Also ähm
Kommst du rein oder nicht?

Mi sono divertita molto
Ho adorato la conversazione

Il deodorante per auto all'ananas
È il mio preferito

se hai tempo

Potrei portarti al primo, secondo, terzo piano

snippet.title: YABI - TIMI HO
snippet.description:
Written & performed by YABI THE G.O.A.T
Recorded at Kadak Nepali Records
Mixing & Mastering by Ruthlex
 
Get connected

YABI : https://www.instagram.com/yabi_the_g.o.a.t?igsh=MzE0anFmemF0bXV6&utm_source=qr

kADAK NEPALI RECORDS: https://www.instagram.com/kadaknepali?igsh=cDVoNW82NmIxbWY1

Ruthlex: https://www.instagram.com/ruthlexx_np?igsh=OHJ3djdvM3NmcHpz


“Timi Ho”  the 4th track from my mixtape Boomerang is finally here. This song is about real connection, loyalty, and the one person who becomes your strength when everything else feels uncertain. Sometimes in life, no matter how far things go, the right energy always comes back to you like a boomerang.
Thank you to everyone who keeps supporting the journey and believing in the music. This one is from the heart.

“Timi Ho” is now streaming on all platforms.

snippet.title: Tere Bin - Aviverse | ‪‪@astheticavi  |‪‪ @MeAbhishekShukla  (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/0H2nWnDwx85PuU7f6gKima?si=f7424035e6694af0

Listen on Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/us/album/tere-bin-single/1877448559

"Tere Bin" is not just a song, it’s a feeling of losing someone you thought was yours forever.

This is a story of love, betrayal, and heartbreak…
When the girl you loved the most chooses someone else, and you’re left behind with memories that refuse to fade.

Every line of this song carries the pain of unanswered questions, broken promises, and the silence after goodbye.

If you’ve ever loved someone truly and lost them… this song will hit you differently.

Credits:

Song Name : Tere Bin
Vocals : Avinash Kumar & Abhishek Shukla
Lyrics : Abhishek Shukla & Avinash Kumar
Composed by : Avinash Kumar & Abhishek Shukla
Producer: Avinash Kumar
Music Producer : Abs
Edited By : Ash Studio
Artwork By : Junaid

Stream On Aviverse Spotify -

https://open.spotify.com/artist/0HTZXytA3dhUpgTADrDn9O

Aviverse's Instagram - https://instagram.com/aviversemusic
Abhishek's Instagram - https://instagram.com/abhishekxavi
Avinash's Instagram - https://instagram.com/aesthetic_avii

lyrics :

तेरे बिन जीना बेकार होवे यार सजनी,
अब भी करता हूँ तेरा इंतज़ार सजनी,
तेरे बिन जीना बेकार होवे यार सजनी,
अब भी होती ना तेरे बिन रात सजनी।

आँखें हैं नम, यादों में तेरी,
अश्कों से मेरे शहर बन गए,
पत्थर ये दिल, धड़कता ना मेरा,
दर्द तेरे ज़ख्म बन गए।

भीगा ये तकिया मेरा खारे पानी से,
जबसे किरदार हुआ है खत्म कहानी से,
आजा वे माही, तेरा रास्ता तकूँ,
तू सुनती नहीं, मैं कहता रहूँ।

तेरे बिन जीना बेकार होवे यार सजनी,
अब भी करता हूँ तेरा इंतज़ार सजनी,
तेरे बिन जीना बेकार होवे यार सजनी,
अब भी होती ना तेरे बिन रात सजनी।

दिल हारा, दिल हारा मैं तेरे लिए,
बैठा मैं बंजारा सिर्फ तेरे लिए,
तेरा दीदार होया मैनू सनम,
बैठा तू गैर नाल, ना आई शर्म।

मेरे पन्ने भी ना खत्म हो रहे,
मेरी स्याही के तुम नज़्म बन गए,
तेरी महक में हम फ़ना हैं सनम, क्यों
मेरा गुलाब तुम दफ़न कर गए।

आजा तू फिर से हम बात करें,
तेरे होंठों से अपना नाम सुनें,
हम तो जाना बेजान थे,
लेके बाहों में आप साँसें बने।

तेरे बिन जीना बेकार होवे यार सजनी,
अब भी करता हूँ तेरा इंतज़ार सजनी,
तेरे बिन जीना बेकार होवे यार सजनी,
अब भी होती ना तेरे बिन रात सजनी।

snippet.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters REMATCH
snippet.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters REMATCH. You asked for it. This was absolutely INSANE.

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @dream
➽ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop

BadBoyHalo:  @thesaintsofgames 
George:  @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap:  @Sapnap 
Antfrost:  @Antfrost 
awesamdude:  @awesamdude 
CaptainPuffy:  @CaptainPuffy 

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

Ben oyunu bitirmeye çalışırken, arkadaşım George, arkadaşım Sapnap, arkadaşım BadBoyHalo, arkadaşım Antfrost, arkadaşım awesamdude ve arkadaşım CaptainPuffy beni durdurmaya çalışıyor. Bu bir yarış ve çok heyecanlıydı, çok güldük. Bu tür challenge’ları yapmayı çok seviyorum.

Bu video 500.000 beğeni alırsa, rövanş yapacağız!

Bu Minecraft, Ama Su Yükseliyor veya Minecraft, Ama Lav Yükseliyor challenge’ları gibi değil. Bu, Minecraft’ta yapılan bir speedrun/speedruner ile bir katil/suikastçi arasındaki mücadele.

#MinecraftManhunt

Decidimos llamar a esta serie Minecraft Manhunt. Este video es un rendición diferente de la misma, donde hay SEIS cazadores en vez de TRES cazadores o solo uno.

Este es un nuevo Minecraft pero, desafío 1.21.11 que hemos decidido intentar. Yo intento vencer el juego, mientras mi amigo George Y mi amigo Sapnap Y mi amigo BadBoyHalo Y mi amigo Antfrost Y mi amigo awesamdude Y mi amiga CaptainPuffy intentan impedírmelo. Es una carrera, y es super intenso y tuvimos muchas risas. Amo hacer estos desafíos.

Si este video consigue 500,000 me gusta haremos una revancha!

No Minecraft, pero el agua sube o Minecraft, pero la lava sube, o cualquier otro desafío, pero, como esos. Esto es un speed run / speed runner de Minecraft contra un matón / asesino.

#MinecraftManhunt

ta.title: மைன்கிராஃப்ட் ஸ்பீட்ரண்ணர் VS 6 வேட்டைக்காரர்கள் மீண்டும் மோதல்
ta.description:
மைன்கிராப்ட் ஸ்பீட்ரனர் VS 6 ஹண்டர்ஸ் ரீமாட்ச். நீங்கள் அதை கேட்டீர்கள். இது முற்றிலும் பைத்தியக்காரமாக இருந்தது.  

என் சமூக வலைத்தளங்களை பின்தொடர்க:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop/

BadBoyHalo:  @thesaintsofgames
George:  @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:  @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
awesamdude:  @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy:  @CaptainPuffy

நாம் இந்த தொடரை மைன்கிராஃப்ட் மேன்பார்வை என அழைக்க முடிவு செய்தோம். இந்த வீடியோ அதன் ஒரு வேறுபட்ட பதிப்பாகும், இதில் மூன்று வேட்டையாளர்கள் அல்லது ஒரே வேட்டையாளரைக் கொண்டிருப்பதற்கு பதிலாக ஆர்‍ழு வேட்டையாளர்கள் உள்ளனர்.

இது புதிய மைன்கிராஃப்ட் 1.21.11 சவால், அதை நாம் முயற்சிக்க முடிவு செய்தோம். நான் விளையாட்டை வெல்ல முயற்சிக்கிறேன், என் நண்பர் ஜார்ஜ், என் நண்பர் ஸாப்னாப், என் நண்பர் பேட்பாய் ஹேலோ, என் நண்பர் ஆன்ட்ஃப்ராஸ்ட், என் நண்பர் அவெசடும்ட்யூட் மற்றும் என் நண்பர் கேப்டன் பஃப்யி என்னை அதை செய்யாமல் தடுப்பதற்கு முயற்சிக்கிறார்கள். இது ஒரு பந்தயம், மிகவும் திறம்பட உள்ளது, நாங்கள் மிகவும் சிரித்தோம். நான் இந்த சவால்களை செய்ய மிகவும் விரும்புகிறேன்.

இந்த வீடியோ 500,000 லைக் கிடைத்தால், நாங்கள் மீண்டும் போட்டியிடுவோம்!

மைன்கிராஃப்ட் அல்ல, ஆனால் நீர் உயர்கிறது அல்லது மைன்கிராஃப்ட் அல்ல, ஆனால் லாவா உயர்கிறது, அல்லது அந்த மாதிரியான வேறு சவால் எதுவும். இது மைன்கிராஃப்ட் விளையாட்டில் ஒரு வேக ஓட்டம் / வேக ஓட்டக்காரர் மற்றும் கொலைவாளர் / பரிந்துரையாளர் விட்டு விளையாடுகிறது.

#MinecraftManhunt

Päätimme nimetä tämän sarjan Minecraft Manhuntiksi. Tämä video on siitä erilainen versio, jossa on KUUSI hunteria KOLMEN tai yhden sijasta.

Tämä on uusi Minecraft mutta..., 1.21.11 -haaste, jota päätimme kokeilla. Yritän läpäistä pelin, samalla kun ystäväni George JA ystäväni Sapnap JA ystäväni BadBoyHalo JA ystäväni Antfrost JA ystäväni awesamdude JA ystäväni CaptainPuffy yrittävät estää minua tekemästä sitä. Se on kilpailu, ja se on super intensiivistä, ja me nauroimme paljon. Rakastan näiden haasteiden tekemistä.

Jos tämä video saa 500 000 tykkäystä, niin otamme uusintaottelun!

Ei Minecraft, Mutta Vesi Nousee tai Minecraft, Mutta Laava Nousee, tai mikään muu vastaava haaste. Tämä on Minecraft speedrun / speedrunneri vastaan tappaja / salamurhaaja.

#MinecraftManhunt

cs.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Lovců REMATCH
cs.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Lovců REMATCH. Řekli jste si o to. Tohle bylo naprosto ŠÍLENÉ.

Sledujte mé sociální sítě: 
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop/

George:  @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:  @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
awesamdude:  @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy:  @CaptainPuffy

Rozhodli jsme se tuto sérii nazvat Minecraft Manhunt. Tohle video je jiné provedení, kde je ŠEST lovců místo TŘÍ lovců nebo jen jednoho. 

Tohle je nová “Minecraft, ale…” challenge v 1.21.11, kterou jsme se rozhodli vyzkoušet. Snažím se vyhrát, zatímco se mi to můj kamarád George A můj kamarád Sapnap A můj kamarád BadBoyHalo A můj kamarád Antfrost A můj kamarád awesamdude A moje kamarádka CaptainPuffy snaží překazit. Je to super intenzivní závod, během kterého jsme se hodně nasmáli. Zbožňuju tyto výzvy. 

Když tohle video získá 500 000 liků, tak uděláme rematch! 

Ne “Minecraft, ale zvedá se hladina vody” nebo “Minecraft, ale zvedá se hladina lávy”, ani žádná podobná challenge. Tohle je Minecraft speedrun / speedrunner proti zabijákovi / vrahovi 

#MinecraftManhunt

snippet.title: Destroying A World That Doesn't Exist
snippet.description:
A strange book appears in Avery's world warning him to run away, so he decides to investigate and hunt down the author - the missing player d3rlord3. But what he discovers inside his world is more than he could have ever imagined..

Avery's channel: @averylargemayo 

Voice of Avery: @andrewgaming677 
Voice of Abel/The Vessel: @Zeemyth 

ORIGINAL MUSIC BY: Ben Bracey (@benbraceymusic on instagram) 
https://soundcloud.com/benbraceymusic/sets/destroying-a-world-that-doesnt


DO NOT READ BELOW FOR SPOILERS:


d3rlord3's channel: @dhutchins333 


This is just a little part of the description where I talk about the video and there is a LOT to say about this guy. The reason this video is so long is because it was originally going to be two parts (a part 2 and a part 3) but the ending of part 2 was a little weak (end of Avery's pov) and I just felt part 3 would require way too much context. Soo we combined them into one.

I think I'm gonna post a full behind the scenes/deleted scenes video on my second channel @Twifies where I talk about how this video was made/why certain decisions were made. But something I really like are all the little headnods to some of my favorite pieces of fiction. Some more explicit, like in the library, but if you ever watched Adventure Time then those lines from the King should have sounded pretty familiar. 

This is easily the longest I've ever spent on a video and I never want it to happen again lol it feels unnatural to wait this long between uploads. I promise I'll be back to normal soon. This will either age well or it's not but this video feels pretty different from part 1 which gets me kind of scared. I think this video is lowkey not that scary, or at least it's not dense with scares and I might have lost the plot of what made part 1 good. But who knows. I think the ending slaps and the weakest scenes are (as always) the parts where you try and force fear. Aka mountain chase, and that chase after the floor disappears beneath Avery in the gray buildings. I just think you can't force fear and tension is where it shines. But who knows I've watched this video so many times I can't tell anymore. 

A note to the villain, I don't think of this as "The King in Yellow" perse, if anything it follows more from the Lovecraftian adaptation, Hastur. But I think this guy is my own adaptation of that adaptation. A King x Bill Cipher x The Lich if that makes any sense. 

Also if you want to support the project/download any of the builds then check them out here. You get every single world featured here + the world from part 1, all for $5:

BUILDS: https://horacecreations.com/products/dtl

I also want to say thank you to a few people bc without them this video would have been completely impossible. So a massive thank you to:
- Zeemyth for not only voicing but helping so much with writing the written books
- Horace and the entire team at HoraceCreations for being so good to work with and making this possible in the first place with their incredible building
- AndrewGaming67 for being so flexible and talented with the voice acting
- Wato and Kenadian for helping me with the more technical feats you've seen (ie boat phasing)
- Ben for the music and being so open to ideas and revisions
- Rekrap2 for sending me that shulker in the sky thing 4 years ago
- Parrot for all the advice and for motivating me to keep making better videos 
- Speedish for recording with me for hours and hours and sitting through my quality checks with me
- YOU for watching :) I really appreciate it 

➤➤ Twitter: https://twitter.com/WifiesWasTaken
➤➤ Discord: https://discord.gg/zAWUuWb


➤➤Links:

Tim Stephenson/The King: https://www.fiverr.com/tim_stephenson/record-a-deep-terrifying-cinematic-villain-voiceover-for-you

EPIDEMIC MUSIC I USE: https://share.epidemicsound.com/1xis5q/?playlist=uad3vzakh605efvoqoi24llhnpr9lm2y

🎵 Copyrighted music licensed from Lickd. https://lickd.co

While My Guitar Gently Weeps (Live from Madison Square Garden, New York, U.S.A, 1971 / 2009 Remaster) by George Harrison, https://t.lickd.co/l/oOPdvzdZ73p

This is NOT series called Minecraft VVSauce where I explore random features of Minecraft. Not Secret Minecraft things or Minecraft lore (like Game Theory) or Escape Rooms, but a crazy super long unfiction video where Averythemayo and d3rlord3 search for the king in yellow? But not really the king in yellow. If anything it's more like hastur x the lich x bill cipher. Not even an arg but you can call it that. It's just video where stuff goes DOWN.
