en.title: Destroying A World That Doesn't Exist
en.description:
A strange book appears in Avery's world warning him to run away, so he decides to investigate and hunt down the author - the missing player d3rlord3. But what he discovers inside his world is more than he could have ever imagined..

Avery's channel: @averylargemayo 

Voice of Avery: @andrewgaming677 
Voice of Abel/The Vessel: @Zeemyth 

ORIGINAL MUSIC BY: Ben Bracey (@benbraceymusic on instagram) 
https://soundcloud.com/benbraceymusic/sets/destroying-a-world-that-doesnt


DO NOT READ BELOW FOR SPOILERS:


d3rlord3's channel: @dhutchins333 


This is just a little part of the description where I talk about the video and there is a LOT to say about this guy. The reason this video is so long is because it was originally going to be two parts (a part 2 and a part 3) but the ending of part 2 was a little weak (end of Avery's pov) and I just felt part 3 would require way too much context. Soo we combined them into one.

I think I'm gonna post a full behind the scenes/deleted scenes video on my second channel @Twifies where I talk about how this video was made/why certain decisions were made. But something I really like are all the little headnods to some of my favorite pieces of fiction. Some more explicit, like in the library, but if you ever watched Adventure Time then those lines from the King should have sounded pretty familiar. 

This is easily the longest I've ever spent on a video and I never want it to happen again lol it feels unnatural to wait this long between uploads. I promise I'll be back to normal soon. This will either age well or it's not but this video feels pretty different from part 1 which gets me kind of scared. I think this video is lowkey not that scary, or at least it's not dense with scares and I might have lost the plot of what made part 1 good. But who knows. I think the ending slaps and the weakest scenes are (as always) the parts where you try and force fear. Aka mountain chase, and that chase after the floor disappears beneath Avery in the gray buildings. I just think you can't force fear and tension is where it shines. But who knows I've watched this video so many times I can't tell anymore. 

A note to the villain, I don't think of this as "The King in Yellow" perse, if anything it follows more from the Lovecraftian adaptation, Hastur. But I think this guy is my own adaptation of that adaptation. A King x Bill Cipher x The Lich if that makes any sense. 

Also if you want to support the project/download any of the builds then check them out here. You get every single world featured here + the world from part 1, all for $5:

BUILDS: https://horacecreations.com/products/dtl

I also want to say thank you to a few people bc without them this video would have been completely impossible. So a massive thank you to:
- Zeemyth for not only voicing but helping so much with writing the written books
- Horace and the entire team at HoraceCreations for being so good to work with and making this possible in the first place with their incredible building
- AndrewGaming67 for being so flexible and talented with the voice acting
- Wato and Kenadian for helping me with the more technical feats you've seen (ie boat phasing)
- Ben for the music and being so open to ideas and revisions
- Rekrap2 for sending me that shulker in the sky thing 4 years ago
- Parrot for all the advice and for motivating me to keep making better videos 
- Speedish for recording with me for hours and hours and sitting through my quality checks with me
- YOU for watching :) I really appreciate it 

➤➤ Twitter: https://twitter.com/WifiesWasTaken
➤➤ Discord: https://discord.gg/zAWUuWb


➤➤Links:

Tim Stephenson/The King: https://www.fiverr.com/tim_stephenson/record-a-deep-terrifying-cinematic-villain-voiceover-for-you

EPIDEMIC MUSIC I USE: https://share.epidemicsound.com/1xis5q/?playlist=uad3vzakh605efvoqoi24llhnpr9lm2y

🎵 Copyrighted music licensed from Lickd. https://lickd.co

While My Guitar Gently Weeps (Live from Madison Square Garden, New York, U.S.A, 1971 / 2009 Remaster) by George Harrison, https://t.lickd.co/l/oOPdvzdZ73p

This is NOT series called Minecraft VVSauce where I explore random features of Minecraft. Not Secret Minecraft things or Minecraft lore (like Game Theory) or Escape Rooms, but a crazy super long unfiction video where Averythemayo and d3rlord3 search for the king in yellow? But not really the king in yellow. If anything it's more like hastur x the lich x bill cipher. Not even an arg but you can call it that. It's just video where stuff goes DOWN.

snippet.title: Lana Del Rey - Cinnamon Girl (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
#lanadelrey #7clouds #cinnamongirl
Thanks for watching my videos.🖤

Song: Lana Del Rey - Cinnamon Girl (Lyrics)

Follow 

Lyrics:

[Verse 1]
Cinnamon in my teeth
From your kiss, you're touching me
All the pills that you take
Violet, blue, green, red to keep me at arm's length don't work
You try to push me out, but I just find my way back in
Violet, blue, green, red to keep me out, I win

[Chorus]
There's things I wanna say to you
But I'll just let you live
Like if you hold me without hurting me
You'll be the first who ever did
There's things I wanna talk about
But better not to give
But if you hold me without hurting me
You'll be the first who ever did

[Post-Chorus]
Ah, ah, ah, ah, ah, ah
Hold me, love me, touch me, honey
Be the first who ever did
Ah, ah, ah, ah, ah, ah
Hold me, love me, touch me, honey
Be the first who ever did

[Verse 2]
Kerosene in my hands
You make me mad, on fire again
All the pills that you take
Violet, blue, green, red to keep me at arm's length don't work

[Chorus]
There's things I wanna say to you
But I'll just let you live
Like if you hold me without hurting me
You'll be the first who ever did
There's things I wanna talk about
But better not to give
But if you hold me without hurting me
You'll be the first who ever did

[Post-Chorus]
Ah, ah, ah, ah, ah, ah
Hold me, love me, touch me, honey
Be the first who ever did
Ah, ah, ah, ah, ah, ah
Hold me, love me, touch me, honey
Be the first who ever did

[Chorus]
There's things I wanna say to you
But I'll just let you live
Like if you hold me without hurting me
You'll be the first who ever did
There's things I wanna talk about
But better not to give
Like if you hold me without hurting me
You'll be the first who ever did
.........

#lanadelrey #cinnamongirl #lyrics

snippet.title: PUBGM 141 ULTIMATE GRIND CHAPTER II PHASE 2 - THE LAST BATTLE - FT. #4T #HORAA #ASI8 #SCYTES #LF #A1
snippet.description:
WELCOME TO PUBG MOBILE 141 ULTIMATE GRIND CHAPTER II

One of the most exciting PUBG MOBILE competitive tournaments in South Asia returns with a new chapter. 

Top teams from Pakistan, Bangladesh, Nepal, Sri Lanka, and Mongolia enter the battlefield to compete in a high-intensity, multi day competition filled with strategy, rotations, and high-pressure fights.

Across multiple days of action, every match will test consistency, teamwork, and decision-making.
Every elimination matters. Every rotation counts. Every moment can change the leaderboard. 

Expect clutch plays, aggressive pushes, and top tier PUBG MOBILE gameplay as teams fight to prove themselves.

Only one team will rise above all and be crowned the Ultimate Grind Champion.

The grind begins now. 

🏆 PARTICIPATING TEAMS

4THRIVES 🇵🇰
Horaa Esports 🇳🇵
Alpha Gaming 🇲🇳
Twisted Mind 🇲🇳
Da Real Soldiers 🇳🇵
ASI8 Esports 🇵🇰
Loyalty First 🇵🇰
Team SCYTES 🇵🇰
Red Death 🇵🇰
313 Esports 🇵🇰
Phoenix Rise 🇵🇰
MAXEBLES 🇵🇰
A1 RG Esports 🇧🇩
ZC GSM Esports 🇧🇩
AMINZ Esports 🇵🇰
Trained to Kill 🇳🇵
Yonko Jutti 🇳🇵
Abrupt Slayers 🇳🇵

⏰ MATCH START TIME

🇵🇰 Pakistan 03:00 PM
🇳🇵 Nepal  03:45 PM
🇧🇩 Bangladesh 04:00 PM
🇲🇳 Mongolia 06:00 PM

📅 TOURNAMENT SCHEDULE

📆 Phase 1: March 24 - March 26
📆 Phase 2: April 1 - April 3, 2026

18 Teams
6 Matches Per Day
18 Matches Per Phase

The team with the best overall performance across all matches will be crowned the PUBG MOBILE 141 Ultimate Grind Champion.

💬 JOIN THE COMMUNITY
https://discord.gg/JH8qB8Qyt

Share your predictions Who will win?
Support your favorite team in the live chat
Experience top tier PUBG MOBILE esports

snippet.title: Franklin Traps ALL HAUNTED GHOST Inside Evil Watch In Indian Bike Driving 3D! 😱
snippet.description:
#NessFitGamer #gta 5 #gta5hindi #gta5mods 

Franklin Traps ALL HAUNTED GHOST Inside Evil Watch In Indian Bike Driving 3D! 😱

In this story, Shinchan gets kidnapped by a demon connected to the Evil Watch. To save him, Franklin must trap all the ghosts and monsters back inside the Evil Watch. These include Granny, Evil Nun, Ice Scream Rod, Kamla, Choo-Choo Charles, and Mr. Meat. Will Franklin be able to save Shinchan or not? Watch the full scary story to find out!

Instagram
https://www.instagram.com/nessfitgamer01?igsh=MTBudmpzZGdnZXljNg==

I hope you guys enjoyed this video if you did please consider to like the video and subscribe the channel. ❤️

Disclaimer:
This video is made using GTA 5, with Indian Bike Driving 3D assets added inside the game.

This is NOT actual gameplay of Indian Bike Driving 3D. Everything shown is custom-made using GTA mods. All characters and events shown in this video are fictional and created for entertainment purpose.
 
This is a fan-made, fictional, and transformative video that falls under Fair Use (Section 107) for commentary, parody, and storytelling.

snippet.title: आ अब लौट चलें | Aa Ab Laut Chalen | Alka Yagnik | Udit Narayan Songs | Aishwarya Rai
snippet.description:
प्यार और भावनाओं से भरी आवाज़ें, Alka Yagnik और Udit Narayan की! सुनिए फिल्म 'Aa Ab Laut Chalen' का ये खूबसूरत गाना और खो जाइये 90s के रोमांटिक दौर में। इस गाने में प्यार की गहराई और मधुरता है जो सीधे दिल को छू जाती है। 1999 के इस गाने को सुनकर आप पुराने दिनों की यादों में खो जाएंगे। ये गाना उन सभी प्रेमियों के लिए है जो अपने प्यार को शब्दों में बयां नहीं कर पाते।



Credits :

Song: Aa Ab Laut Chalen
Album: Aa Ab Laut Chalen
Artist: Alka Yagnik | Udit Narayan
Music Director: Nadeem-Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer 


अगर ये गाना आपको पसंद आया तो Like करें, Comment करें और हमें Subscribe करना न भूलें! अपनी पसंदीदा 90s के गाने के बारे में कमेंट सेक्शन में बताएं।

I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine
And I see forever in your eyes
I feel okay when I see you smile, smile

[Outro]

What’s up, Survivors!

The ocean's calling. Jump into the Undersea Mystery and discover what's hiding beneath the waves!
And say hi to Pyro, your new fiery companion who grows with you every day.

Dive in… the secrets in the water are waiting.

xoxo,
Kelly

ml.title: കെല്ലി ഷോ: S07E02 | പാച്ച് ഹൈലൈറ്റുകൾ | ഫ്രീ ഫയർ ഒഫീഷ്യൽ
ml.description:
കെല്ലി ഷോ: S07E02 | പാച്ച് ഹൈലൈറ്റുകൾ | ഫ്രീ ഫയർ ഒഫീഷ്യൽ

എന്താണ് വിശേഷം, അതിജീവിച്ചവർ!

സമുദ്രം വിളിക്കുന്നു. അണ്ടർസീ മിസ്റ്ററിയിലേക്ക് ചാടി തിരമാലകൾക്കടിയിൽ എന്താണ് ഒളിഞ്ഞിരിക്കുന്നതെന്ന് കണ്ടെത്തുക!
എല്ലാ ദിവസവും നിങ്ങളോടൊപ്പം വളരുന്ന നിങ്ങളുടെ പുതിയ ഉജ്ജ്വല കൂട്ടാളിയായ പൈറോയോട് ഹായ് പറയൂ.

മുങ്ങുക... വെള്ളത്തിലെ രഹസ്യങ്ങൾ കാത്തിരിക്കുന്നു.

xoxo,
കെല്ലി

#ഫ്രീഫയർ #ബൂയാ #FFUnderseaMystery

ta.title: கெல்லி ஷோ: பருவம் 07, அத்தியாயம் 02 | பேட்ச் சிறப்பம்சங்கள் | ஃப்ரீ ஃபயர் அதிகாரப்பூர்வ தளம்
ta.description:
கெல்லி ஷோ: சீசன் 07, எபிசோட் 02 | பேட்ச் சிறப்பம்சங்கள் | ஃப்ரீ ஃபயர் அதிகாரப்பூர்வ தளம்

வணக்கம், சர்வைவர்ஸ்!

கடல் உங்களை அழைக்கிறது. கடலடி மர்மத்திற்குள் குதித்து, அலைகளுக்கு அடியில் என்ன மறைந்திருக்கிறது என்பதைக் கண்டறியுங்கள்!

மேலும், ஒவ்வொரு நாளும் உங்களுடன் வளரும் உங்கள் புதிய நெருப்புத் தோழனான பைரோவிற்கு வணக்கம் சொல்லுங்கள்.

உள்ளே மூழ்குங்கள்... நீரில் உள்ள ரகசியங்கள் உங்களுக்காகக் காத்திருக்கின்றன.

அன்புடன், கெல்லி

#ஃப்ரீஃபயர் #பூயா #FFஅண்டர்சீமிஸ்டரி

pa.title: ਕੈਲੀ ਸ਼ੋਅ: S07E02 | ਪੈਚ ਹਾਈਲਾਈਟਸ | ਫ੍ਰੀ ਫਾਇਰ ਆਫੀਸ਼ੀਅਲ
pa.description:
ਕੈਲੀ ਸ਼ੋਅ: S07E02 | ਪੈਚ ਹਾਈਲਾਈਟਸ | ਫ੍ਰੀ ਫਾਇਰ ਆਫੀਸ਼ੀਅਲ

ਕੀ ਹੋ ਰਿਹਾ ਹੈ, ਬਚੇ ਹੋਏ ਲੋਕ!

ਸਮੁੰਦਰ ਬੁਲਾ ਰਿਹਾ ਹੈ। ਸਮੁੰਦਰ ਦੇ ਹੇਠਾਂ ਰਹੱਸ ਵਿੱਚ ਛਾਲ ਮਾਰੋ ਅਤੇ ਲਹਿਰਾਂ ਦੇ ਹੇਠਾਂ ਕੀ ਲੁਕਿਆ ਹੋਇਆ ਹੈ ਨੂੰ ਖੋਜੋ!

ਅਤੇ ਪਾਈਰੋ ਨੂੰ ਹੈਲੋ ਕਹੋ, ਤੁਹਾਡਾ ਨਵਾਂ ਅਗਨੀ ਸਾਥੀ ਜੋ ਹਰ ਰੋਜ਼ ਤੁਹਾਡੇ ਨਾਲ ਵਧਦਾ ਹੈ।

ਡੁਬਕੀ ਲਗਾਓ... ਪਾਣੀ ਵਿੱਚ ਭੇਦ ਉਡੀਕ ਕਰ ਰਹੇ ਹਨ।

xoxo,

ja.title: ケリーショー：シーズン7エピソード2｜パッチハイライト｜フリーファイア公式
ja.description:
ケリーショー：シーズン7 エピソード2 | パッチハイライト | フリーファイア公式

サバイバーの皆さん、こんにちは！

海が呼んでいます。海底ミステリーに飛び込んで、波の下に隠された秘密を探りましょう！

そして、毎日一緒に成長していく、炎の新たな仲間、パイロにも挨拶しましょう。

さあ、飛び込もう…水中に秘められた秘密があなたを待っています。

xoxo、
ケリー

#FreeFire #Booyah #FFUnderseaMystery

ar.title: برنامج كيلي: الموسم 7 الحلقة 2 | أبرز أحداث التحديث | فري فاير الرسمي
ar.description:
برنامج كيلي: الموسم 7 الحلقة 2 | أبرز أحداث التحديث | فري فاير الرسمي

مرحباً أيها الناجون!

المحيط يناديكم. انطلقوا في مغامرة "أسرار ما تحت الماء" واكتشفوا ما يخفيه قاع البحر!

ولا تنسوا الترحيب ببايرو، رفيقكم الناري الجديد الذي ينمو معكم يوماً بعد يوم.

انغمسوا في أعماق البحار... فالأسرار تنتظركم.

مع حبي، كيلي

bn.title: কেলি শো: সিজন ০৭ পর্ব ০২ | প্যাচ হাইলাইটস | ফ্রি ফায়ার অফিসিয়াল
bn.description:

কী খবর, সারভাইভারস!

সমুদ্র ডাকছে। আন্ডারসি মিস্ট্রি-তে ঝাঁপিয়ে পড়ুন এবং আবিষ্কার করুন ঢেউয়ের নিচে কী লুকিয়ে আছে!

আর দেখা করুন পাইরোর সাথে, আপনার নতুন অগ্নিময় সঙ্গী যে আপনার সাথে প্রতিদিন বেড়ে উঠবে।

ডুব দিন… জলের নিচের রহস্যগুলো অপেক্ষা করছে।

ভালোবাসা সহ, কেলি

hi.title: केली शो: S07E02 | पैच हाइलाइट्स | फ्री फायर ऑफिशियल
hi.description:
केली शो: सीज़न 7 एपिसोड 2 | पैच हाइलाइट्स | फ्री फायर ऑफिशियल

क्या हाल है, सर्वाइवर्स!

समुद्र बुला रहा है। अंडरसी मिस्ट्री में कूद पड़ो और लहरों के नीचे छिपे रहस्यों को खोजो!

और पायरो से मिलो, तुम्हारा नया जोशीला साथी जो हर दिन तुम्हारे साथ बढ़ता है।

गोता लगाओ... पानी में छिपे रहस्य तुम्हारा इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं।

xoxo,
केली

Lyrics:

[Chorus]
I live my day as if it was the last
Live my day as if there was no past
Doin' it all night, all summer
Doin' it the way I wanna
Yeah, I'ma dance my heart out 'til the dawn
But I won't be done when mornin' comes
Doin' it all night, all summer
Gonna spend it like no other

[Verse 1]
It was a crush
But I couldn't, couldn't get enough
It was a rush
But I gave it up
It was a crush
Now, I might've went and said too much
But that's all it was
So I gave it up

[Chorus]
I live my day as if it was the last
Live my day as if there was no past
Doin' it all night, all summer
Doin' it the way I wanna
Yeah, I'ma dance my heart out 'til the dawn
But I won't be done when mornin' comes
